t_id.sabiq: Kami mengajak kalian kepada kesesatan dan kalian memenuhi ajakan kami itu. Tugas kami adalah menipu untuk mengajak manusia kepada kesesatan kami. Kesalahan bukan ada pada kami.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka kami telah menyesatkan kalian) sebagai penjelasan dari perkataan mereka yang disitir oleh firman-Nya (sesungguhnya kami adalah orang-orang yang sesat.)
t_id.iwq: Maka kami telah menyesatkan kamu, sesungguhnya kami adalah orang-orang yang sesat.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فأغويناكم» المعلل بقولهم «إنا كنا غاوين»
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka kami telah menyesatkan kalian) sebagai penjelasan dari perkataan mereka yang disitir oleh firman-Nya (sesungguhnya kami adalah orang-orang yang sesat)

t.sahih-int: So indeed they, that Day, will be sharing in the punishment
t.asad: And, verily, on that Day they all will share in their common suffering
t.yusuf-ali: Truly, that Day, they will (all) share in the Penalty
t.pickthall: Then lo! this day they (both) are sharers in the doom
t.arberry: So all of them on that day are sharers in the chastisement
t.hilali-khan: Then verily, that Day, they will (all) share in the torment
t.itani: On that Day, they will share in the punishment.
t.mubarakpuri: Then verily, that Day, they will (all) share in the torment.
t.qarib: On that Day, they will share in the punishment
t.wahiduddin: On that Day they will all share the punishment
t.shakir: So they shall on that day be sharers in the chastisement one with another
t.haleem: On that Day they will all share the torment
t.maariful: So, that day, they will share each other in punishment
t.khattab: Surely on that Day they will ˹all˺ share in the punishment
t.ghali: So, upon that Day, surely they are partners in the torment
t.irving: They will become partners in torment on that day
t.iwq: Thus verily they, that Day, will be sharing in the punishment

t_id.kemenag: Maka sesungguhnya mereka pada hari itu bersama-sama dalam azab.
t_id.sabiq: Sesungguhnya, baik pengikut maupun orang-orang yang diikuti, semuanya bersama-sama akan disiksa pada hari kiamat.
t_id.jalalayn-id: Allah swt. berfirman, (Maka sesungguhnya mereka pada hari itu) pada hari kiamat (bersama-sama dalam azab) karena mereka bersekutu dalam kesesatan.
t_id.iwq: Maka sesungguhnya mereka pada hari itu bersama-sama dalam azab.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: قال تعالى «فإنهم يومئذ» يوم القيامة «في العذاب مشتركون» أي لاشتراكهم في الغواية
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Allah swt. berfirman, (Maka sesungguhnya mereka pada hari itu) pada hari kiamat (bersama-sama dalam azab) karena mereka bersekutu dalam kesesatan

t.sahih-int: Indeed, that is how We deal with the criminals
t.asad: Verily, thus shall We deal with all who were lost in sin
t.yusuf-ali: Verily that is how We shall deal with Sinners
t.pickthall: Lo! thus deal We with the guilty
t.arberry: Even so We do with the sinners
t.hilali-khan: Certainly, that is how We deal with Al-Mujrimun (polytheists, sinners, criminals, the disobedient to Allah, etc)
t.itani: Thus We deal with the sinners.
t.mubarakpuri: Certainly, that is how We deal with the criminals.
t.qarib: for that is how We deal with those who forced others to reject Our messages
t.wahiduddin: that is how We deal with evil-doers
t.shakir: Surely thus do We deal with the guilty
t.haleem: this is how We deal with the guilty
t.maariful: This is how We deal with the criminals
t.khattab: That is certainly how We deal with the wicked
t.ghali: Surely thus We perform against the criminals
t.irving: Thus We deal with criminals
t.iwq: Indeed, that is how We deal with the criminals

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya demikianlah Kami berbuat terhadap orang-orang yang berbuat jahat.
t_id.sabiq: Dengan siksa seperti itu, Kami akan mengazab orang-orang yang melanggar hak Allah dengan kemusyrikan dan perbuatan maksiat.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya demikianlah) artinya, sebagaimana Kami memperlakukan mereka (Kami berbuat terhadap orang-orang yang jahat) selain mereka. Yakni Kami pasti akan mengazab orang yang sesat beserta pengikut-pengikutnya.
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya demikianlah Kami berbuat terhadap orang-orang yang berbuat jahat.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إنا كذلك» كما نفعل بهؤلاء «نفعل بالمجرمين» غير هؤلاء: أي نعذبهم التابع منهم والمتبوع
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya demikianlah) artinya, sebagaimana Kami memperlakukan mereka (Kami berbuat terhadap orang-orang yang jahat) selain mereka. Yakni Kami pasti akan mengazab orang yang sesat beserta pengikut-pengikutnya

ar: إِنَّهُمۡ كَانُوۤا۟ إِذَا قِیلَ لَهُمۡ لَاۤ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ یَسۡتَكۡبِرُونَ
ar_simple: إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا إِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ يَسْتَكْبِرُونَ
transliteration: innahum kānū idhā qīla lahum lā ilāha illā l-lahu yastakbirūna

t.sahih-int: Indeed they, when it was said to them, "There is no deity but Allah," were arrogant
t.asad: for, behold, whenever they were told, “There is no deity save God,” they would glory in their arrogance
t.yusuf-ali: For they, when they were told that there is no god except Allah, would puff themselves up with Pride
t.pickthall: For when it was said unto them, There is no Allah save Allah, they were scornful
t.arberry: for when it was said to them, 'There is no god but God,' they were ever waxing proud
t.hilali-khan: Truly, when it was said to them: La ilaha ill-Allah "(none has the right to be worshipped but Allah)," they puffed themselves up with pride (i.e. denied it)
t.itani: When it was said to them, “There is no god except God,” they grew arrogant.
t.mubarakpuri: Truly, when it was said to them: "La ilaha illallah," they puffed themselves up with pride.
t.qarib: Whenever they were told, "There is no god but God," they became arrogant
t.wahiduddin: When they were told, "There is no deity but God," they turned away with disdain
t.shakir: Surely they used to behave proudly when it was said to them: There is no god but Allah
t.haleem: Whenever it was said to them, ‘There is no deity but God,’ they became arrogant
t.maariful: They were those to whom when it was said: “There is no god but Allah”, they waxed proud
t.khattab: For whenever it was said to them ˹in the world˺, “There is no god ˹worthy of worship˺ except Allah,” they acted arrogantly
t.ghali: Surely when it was said to them, "There is no god except Allah, " they were waxing proud
t.irving: They have acted so proudly whenever: "There is no deity except God [Alone]" was said to them
t.iwq: Indeed they, when it was said to them, "There is no deity but Allah," were arrogant

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya mereka dahulu apabila dikatakan kepada mereka: "Laa ilaaha illallah" (Tiada Tuhan yang berhak disembah melainkan Allah) mereka menyombongkan diri,
t_id.sabiq: Dahulu, ketika dikatakan Lâ ilâha illâ Allâh kepada mereka, dengan sombong dan angkuh mereka enggan menyatakannya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya mereka) yaitu orang-orang tersebut; dialamatkan kepada mereka karena berdasarkan penjelasan selanjutnya yaitu (dahulu apabila dikatakan kepada mereka, "Laa Ilaaha Illallaah") Tiada Tuhan melainkan Allah, (mereka menyombongkan diri.)
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya mereka dahulu apabila dikatakan kepada mereka: "Laa ilaaha illallah" (Tiada Tuhan yang berhak disembah melainkan Allah) mereka menyombongkan diri,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إنهم» أي هؤلاء بقرينة ما بعده «كانوا إذا قيل لهم لا إله إلا الله يستكبرون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِنَّهُمۡ كَانُوٓاْ إِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمۡ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ يَسۡتَكۡبِرُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya mereka) yaitu orang-orang tersebut; dialamatkan kepada mereka karena berdasarkan penjelasan selanjutnya yaitu (dahulu apabila dikatakan kepada mereka, "Laa Ilaaha Illallaah") Tiada Tuhan melainkan Allah, (mereka menyombongkan diri)

ar: وَیَقُولُونَ أَئِنَّا لَتَارِكُوۤا۟ ءَالِهَتِنَا لِشَاعِرࣲ مَّجۡنُونِۭ
ar_simple: وَيَقُولُونَ أَئِنَّا لَتَارِكُو آلِهَتِنَا لِشَاعِرٍ مَجْنُونٍ
transliteration: wayaqūlūna a-innā latārikū ālihatinā lishāʿirin majnūnin

t.sahih-int: And were saying, "Are we to leave our gods for a mad poet
t.asad: and would say, “Shall we, then, give up our deities at the bidding of a mad poet?”
t.yusuf-ali: And say: "What! shall we give up our gods for the sake of a Poet possessed
t.pickthall: And said: Shall we forsake our gods for a mad poet
t.arberry: saying, 'What, shall we forsake our gods for a poet possessed
t.hilali-khan: And (they) said: "Are we going to abandon our aliha (gods) for the sake of a mad poet
t.itani: And said, “Are we to abandon our gods for a mad poet?”
t.mubarakpuri: And (they) said: "Are we going to abandon our gods for the sake of a mad poet"
t.qarib: and would say, "Are we to give up our gods for a mad poet
t.wahiduddin: and replied, "Shall we then give up our deities at the bidding of a mad poet
t.shakir: And to say: What! shall we indeed give up our gods for the sake of a mad poet
t.haleem: and said, ‘Are we to forsake our gods for a mad poet?’
t.maariful: and used to say, “Are we really to leave our gods because of an insane poet?”
t.khattab: and argued, “Should we really abandon our gods for a mad poet?”
t.ghali: And they said, "Shall we surely be leaving indeed our gods for a mad poet
t.irving: and they were saying: ´Should we abandon our gods for a crazy poet
t.iwq: And were saying, "Are we to leave our gods for a mad poet

t_id.kemenag: dan mereka berkata: "Apakah sesungguhnya kami harus meninggalkan sembahan-sembahan kami karena seorang penyair gila?"
t_id.sabiq: Mereka mengatakan, "Apakah kami harus meninggalkan tuhan-tuhan yang kami sembah hanya karena omongan seorang penyair gila?"
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan mereka berkata, "Apakah sesungguhnya kami) lafal A-innaa dapat pula dibaca Ayinnaa (harus meninggalkan sesembahan-sesembahan kami karena seorang penyair gila?") yakni demi karena Muhammad.
t_id.iwq: dan mereka berkata: "Apakah sesungguhnya kami harus meninggalkan sembahan-sembahan kami karena seorang penyair gila?"

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ويقولون أئنا» في همزتيه ما تقدم «لتاركوا آلهتنا لشاعر مجنون» أي لأجل محمد
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَيَقُولُونَ أَئِنَّا لَتَارِكُوٓاْ ءَالِهَتِنَا لِشَاعِرٖ مَّجۡنُونِۭ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan mereka berkata, "Apakah sesungguhnya kami) lafal A-innaa dapat pula dibaca Ayinnaa (harus meninggalkan sesembahan-sesembahan kami karena seorang penyair gila?") yakni demi karena Muhammad

t.sahih-int: Rather, the Prophet has come with the truth and confirmed the [previous] messengers
t.asad: Nay, but he [whom you call a mad poet] has brought the truth; and he confirms the truth of [what the earlier of God’s] message-bearers [have taught]
t.yusuf-ali: Nay! he has come with the (very) Truth, and he confirms (the Message of) the messengers (before him)
t.pickthall: Nay, but he brought the Truth, and he confirmed those sent (before him)
t.arberry: No indeed; but he brought the truth, and confirmed the Envoys
t.hilali-khan: Nay! he (Muhammad SAW) has come with the truth (i.e. Allah's Religion - Islamic Monotheism and this Quran) and he confirms the Messengers (before him who brought Allah's religion - Islamic Monotheism)
t.itani: In fact, he came with the truth, and he confirmed the messengers.
t.mubarakpuri: Nay! he has come with the truth and he confirms the Messengers.
t.qarib: Rather, the Prophet has come with the Truth and confirmed the [previous] messengers
t.wahiduddin: Surely, he has brought the truth, confirming those who were sent before
t.shakir: Nay: he has come with the truth and verified the apostles
t.haleem: ‘No: he brought the truth and confirmed the earlier messengers
t.maariful: No, he has come with Truth and has confirmed all the messengers (of Allah)
t.khattab: In fact, he came with the truth, confirming ˹earlier˺ messengers
t.ghali: No indeed, (but) he has come with the Truth and has sincere (faith) in the Emissaries
t.irving: Rather he has brought the Truth and vouches for the emissaries
t.iwq: Rather, the Prophet has come with the truth and confirmed the previous messengers

t_id.kemenag: Sebenarnya dia (Muhammad) telah datang membawa kebenaran dan membenarkan rasul-rasul (sebelumnya).
t_id.sabiq: Sebenarnya, rasul mereka (Muhammad) telah datang membawa ajaran tauhid yang juga diserukan oleh semua rasul. Dan dengan ajaran itu ia telah membenarkan dakwah para rasul.
t_id.jalalayn-id: Allah swt. berfirman: (Sebenarnya dia Muhammad telah datang membawa kebenaran dan membenarkan rasul-rasul) yang juga datang membawa kebenaran, yaitu kalimat Laa Ilaaha Illallaah/tidak ada Tuhan selain Allah.
t_id.iwq: Sebenarnya dia (Muhammad) telah datang membawa kebenaran dan membenarkan rasul-rasul (sebelumnya).

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: قال تعالى: «بل جاء بالحق وصدَّق المرسلين» الجائين به، وهو أن لا إله إلا الله
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Allah swt. berfirman: (Sebenarnya dia Muhammad telah datang membawa kebenaran dan membenarkan rasul-rasul) yang juga datang membawa kebenaran, yaitu kalimat Laa Ilaaha Illallaah/tidak ada Tuhan selain Allah

t.sahih-int: Indeed, you [disbelievers] will be tasters of the painful punishment
t.asad: Behold, you will indeed taste grievous suffering [in the life to come]
t.yusuf-ali: Ye shall indeed taste of the Grievous Penalty
t.pickthall: Lo! (now) verily ye taste the painful doom
t.arberry: Now certainly you shall be tasting the painful chastisement
t.hilali-khan: Verily, you (pagans of Makkah) are going to taste the painful torment
t.itani: Most assuredly, you will taste the painful punishment.
t.mubarakpuri: Verily, you are going to taste the painful torment;
t.qarib: You [who deny the truth] will taste the painful punishment
t.wahiduddin: you shall surely taste the painful punishment
t.shakir: Most surely you will taste the painful punishment
t.haleem: you will taste the painful torment
t.maariful: Surely you have to taste the painful punishment
t.khattab: You will certainly taste the painful torment
t.ghali: Surely you will indeed be tasting the painful torment
t.irving: Yet you will taste painful torment
t.iwq: Indeed, you disbelievers will be tasters of the painful punishment

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya kamu pasti akan merasakan azab yang pedih.
t_id.sabiq: Sesungguhnya kalian, hai orang-orang musyrik, akan merasakan siksa yang pedih di akhirat.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya kalian) di dalam ungkapan ini terkandung Iltifat karena seharusnya Innahum (pasti akan merasakan azab yang pedih.)
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya kamu pasti akan merasakan azab yang pedih.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إنكم» فيه التفات «لذائقوا العذاب الأليم»
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya kalian) di dalam ungkapan ini terkandung Iltifat karena seharusnya Innahum (pasti akan merasakan azab yang pedih)

ar: وَمَا تُجۡزَوۡنَ إِلَّا مَا كُنتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُونَ
ar_simple: وَمَا تُجْزَوْنَ إِلَّا مَا كُنْتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
transliteration: wamā tuj'zawna illā mā kuntum taʿmalūna

t.sahih-int: And you will not be recompensed except for what you used to do
t.asad: although you shall not be requited for aught but what you were wont to do
t.yusuf-ali: But it will be no more than the retribution of (the Evil) that ye have wrought
t.pickthall: Ye are requited naught save what ye did
t.arberry: and not be recompensed, except according to what you were doing
t.hilali-khan: And you will be requited nothing except for what you used to do (evil deeds, sins, and Allah's disobedience which you used to do in this world)
t.itani: And you will be repaid only for what you used to do.
t.mubarakpuri: And you will be requited nothing except for what you used to do.
t.qarib: and you will be repaid only for what you used to do
t.wahiduddin: and be rewarded only according to your deeds
t.shakir: And you shall not be rewarded except (for) what you did
t.haleem: and be repaid only according to your deeds.’
t.maariful: And you will be recompensed for nothing but for what you used to do
t.khattab: and will only be rewarded for what you used to do
t.ghali: And in no way will you be recompensed, except according to whatever you were doing
t.irving: and only be rewarded for what you have been doing
t.iwq: And you will not be recompensed except for what you used to do

t_id.kemenag: Dan kamu tidak diberi pembalasan melainkan terhadap kejahatan yang telah kamu kerjakan,

t_id.iwq: tetapi hamba-hamba Allah yang dibersihkan (dari dosa).

t_id.kemenag: yaitu buah-buahan. Dan mereka adalah orang-orang yang dimuliakan,
t_id.sabiq: Yaitu buah-buahan yang bermacam-macam. Mereka adalah orang-orang yang ditenteramkan dan dimuliakan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Yaitu buah-buahan) menjadi Badal atau 'Athaf Bayan dari lafal Rizqun; yaitu bermacam-macam rezeki yang dimakan hanya untuk dinikmati, bukan untuk memelihara kesehatan, karena penduduk surga tidak perlu lagi memelihara kesehatan sebab mereka telah diciptakan untuk hidup abadi dan sehat selama-lamanya. (Dan mereka adalah orang-orang yang dimuliakan) dengan pahala yang berlimpah dari Allah swt.
t_id.iwq: yaitu buah-buahan. Dan mereka adalah orang-orang yang dimuliakan,

tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Yaitu buah-buahan) menjadi Badal atau 'Athaf Bayan dari lafal Rizqun; yaitu bermacam-macam rezeki yang dimakan hanya untuk dinikmati, bukan untuk memelihara kesehatan, karena penduduk surga tidak perlu lagi memelihara kesehatan sebab mereka telah diciptakan untuk hidup abadi dan sehat selama-lamanya. (Dan mereka adalah orang-orang yang dimuliakan) dengan pahala yang berlimpah dari Allah swt

t.sahih-int: There will be circulated among them a cup [of wine] from a flowing spring
t.asad: A cup will be passed round among them [with a drink] from unsullied springs
t.yusuf-ali: Round will be passed to them a Cup from a clear-flowing fountain
t.pickthall: A cup from a gushing spring is brought round for them
t.arberry: a cup from a spring being passed round to them
t.hilali-khan: Round them will be passed a cup of pure wine
t.itani: They will be offered a cup of pure drink.
t.mubarakpuri: Round them will be passed a cup of pure wine
t.qarib: A cup from a flowing spring will be passed among them
t.wahiduddin: A drink will be passed round among them from a flowing spring
t.shakir: A bowl shall be made to go round them from water running out of springs
t.haleem: A drink will be passed round among them from a flowing spring
t.maariful: They will be served with a cup from a flowing drink
t.khattab: A drink ˹of pure wine˺ will be passed around to them from a flowing stream
t.ghali: A cup from a profuse (spring) is passed round for them
t.irving: A cup will he passed around for them from a clear spring
t.iwq: There will be circulated among them a cup of wine from a flowing spring

t_id.kemenag: Diedarkan kepada mereka gelas yang berisi khamar dari sungai yang mengalir.
t_id.sabiq: Mereka dikelilingi oleh anak-anak kecil yang membawa bejana berisikan minuman dari sumber yang terus mengalir tanpa terputus.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Diedarkan kepada mereka) maksudnya, kepada masing-masing di antara mereka diedarkan (gelas) yaitu tempat untuk minum berikut minumannya (yang berisikan khamar dari sungai khamar) yang mengalir bagaikan sungai di bumi.
t_id.iwq: Diedarkan kepada mereka gelas yang berisi khamar dari sungai yang mengalir.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «يطاف عليهم» على كل منهم «بكأس» هو الإناء بشرابه «من معين» من خمر يجري على وجه الأرض كأنهار الماء
tafsir.siraj-ar: يُطَافُ عَلَيۡهِم بِكَأۡسٖ مِّن مَّعِينِۭ (بِكَاسٍ: بِخَمْرٍ, مِن مَّعِينٍ: مِنْ أَنْهَارٍ جَارِيَةٍ لَا يَخَافُونَ انْقِطَاعَهَا)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Diedarkan kepada mereka) maksudnya, kepada masing-masing di antara mereka diedarkan (gelas) yaitu tempat untuk minum berikut minumannya (yang berisikan khamar dari sungai khamar) yang mengalir bagaikan sungai di bumi

t_id.kemenag: (Warnanya) putih bersih, sedap rasanya bagi orang-orang yang minum.
t_id.sabiq: Warnanya putih bersih ketika dicampur. Rasanya pun menggairahkan orang-orang yang meminumnya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Warnanya putih) lebih putih daripada air susu (sedap rasanya) sangat lezat rasanya (bagi orang-orang yang minum) berbeda dengan khamar di dunia yang apabila diminum rasanya tidak enak.
t_id.iwq: (Warnanya) putih bersih, sedap rasanya bagi orang-orang yang minum.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «بيضاء» أشد بياضا من اللبن «لذة» لذيذة «للشاربين» بخلاف خمر الدنيا فإنها كريهة عند الشرب
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Warnanya putih) lebih putih daripada air susu (sedap rasanya) sangat lezat rasanya (bagi orang-orang yang minum) berbeda dengan khamar di dunia yang apabila diminum rasanya tidak enak

ar: لَا فِیهَا غَوۡلࣱ وَلَا هُمۡ عَنۡهَا یُنزَفُونَ
ar_simple: لَا فِيهَا غَوْلٌ وَلَا هُمْ عَنْهَا يُنْزَفُونَ
transliteration: lā fīhā ghawlun walā hum ʿanhā yunzafūna

t.sahih-int: No bad effect is there in it, nor from it will they be intoxicated
t.asad: no headiness will be in it, and they will not get drunk thereon
t.yusuf-ali: Free from headiness; nor will they suffer intoxication therefrom
t.pickthall: Wherein there is no headache nor are they made mad thereby
t.arberry: wherein no sickness is, neither intoxication
t.hilali-khan: Neither they will have Ghoul (any kind of hurt, abdominal pain, headache, a sin, etc.) from that, nor will they suffer intoxication therefrom
t.itani: Never polluted, and never intoxicating.
t.mubarakpuri: Neither will they have Ghawl from that nor will they suffer intoxication therefrom.
t.qarib: which will neither sicken nor intoxicate them
t.wahiduddin: causing no headiness or intoxication
t.shakir: There shall be no trouble in it, nor shall they be exhausted therewith
t.haleem: causing no headiness or intoxication
t.maariful: There will be no headache therein, nor will they be intoxicated with it
t.khattab: It will neither harm ˹them˺, nor will they be intoxicated by it
t.ghali: Wherein there is no insobriety, (Or: havoc, danger) nor are they exhausted (Or: inebriated) thereby
t.irving: There will be no hangover from it nor will they feel exhausted by it
t.iwq: No bad effect is there in it, nor from it will they be intoxicated

t_id.kemenag: Tidak ada dalam khamar itu alkohol dan mereka tiada mabuk karenanya.
t_id.sabiq: Minuman itu tidak membuat pusing dan membuat mereka mabuk. Dengan meminumnya kesadaran mereka tidak hilang.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Tidak ada di dalam khamar itu alkohol) yakni zat yang membuat akal mereka mabuk (dan mereka tiada mabuk karenanya) dapat dibaca Yunzafuuna atau yanzifuuna, yang berasal dari kalimat, Nazafasy Syaaribu, dan Anzafa, artinya memabukkan; maksudnya khamar surga itu tidak memabukkan berbeda halnya dengan khamar di dunia.
t_id.iwq: Tidak ada dalam khamar itu alkohol dan mereka tiada mabuk karenanya.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «لا فيها غول» ما يغتال عقولهم «ولا هم عنها ينزَِفون» بفتح الزاي وكسرها من نزف الشارب وأنزف: أي يسكرون بخلاف خمر الدنيا
tafsir.siraj-ar: لَا فِيهَا غَوۡلٞ وَلَا هُمۡ عَنۡهَا يُنزَفُونَ (لَا فِيهَا غَوْلٌ: لَيْسَ فِيهَا مَا يَغْتَالُ عُقُولَهُمْ, وَلَا هُمْ عَنْهَا يُنزَفُونَ: لَا يَسْكَرُونَ، وَلَا تَضُرُّ أَبْدَانَهُمْ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Tidak ada di dalam khamar itu alkohol) yakni zat yang membuat akal mereka mabuk (dan mereka tiada mabuk karenanya) dapat dibaca Yunzafuuna atau yanzifuuna, yang berasal dari kalimat, Nazafasy Syaaribu, dan Anzafa, artinya memabukkan; maksudnya khamar surga itu tidak memabukkan berbeda halnya dengan khamar di dunia

t.sahih-int: And with them will be women limiting [their] glances, with large, [beautiful] eyes
t.asad: And with them will be mates of modest gaze, most beautiful of eye
t.yusuf-ali: And besides them will be chaste women, restraining their glances, with big eyes (of wonder and beauty)
t.pickthall: And with them are those of modest gaze, with lovely eyes
t.arberry: and with them wide-eyed maidens restraining their glances
t.hilali-khan: And with them will be chaste females, restraining their glances (desiring none except their husbands), with wide and beautiful eyes

t.mubarakpuri: And beside them will be Qasirat-At-Tarf with (wide and beautiful) eyes.
