t.shakir: And with them shall be those who restrain the eyes, having beautiful eyes
t.haleem: With them will be spouses- modest of gaze and beautiful of eye
t.maariful: and by their side there will be females restricting their gazes (to their husbands), having pretty big eyes
t.khattab: And with them will be maidens of modest gaze and gorgeous eyes
t.ghali: And in their presence are wide-eyed (maidens), restraining their glances
t.irving: With them will be bashful women whose eyes still sparkle
t.iwq: And with them will be women limiting their glances, with large, beautiful eyes

t_id.kemenag: Di sisi mereka ada bidadari-bidadari yang tidak liar pandangannya dan jelita matanya,
t_id.sabiq: Di surga, di sisi orang-orang yang dibersihkan dari dosa itu terdapat bidadari-bidadari yang diciptakan dalam keadaan terjaga kesuciannya. Pandangan mereka hanya tertuju pada pasangannya. Mereka tidak mau melihat keinginan syahwat yang menyesatkan. Kecantikan mereka ada pada kejelitaan matanya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Di sisi mereka ada bidadari-bidadari yang tidak liar pandangannya) yaitu bidadari-bidadari yang selalu menundukkan pandangan matanya, atau dengan kata lain mereka hanya memandang suami-suami mereka saja dan tidak memandang orang lain, karena menurut mereka suami-suami mereka adalah orang-orang yang paling cakap (dan jelita matanya) artinya mata bidadari-bidadari itu sangat jelita.
t_id.iwq: Di sisi mereka ada bidadari-bidadari yang tidak liar pandangannya dan jelita matanya,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وعندهم قاصرات الطرْف» حابسات الأعين على أزواجهن لا ينظرن إلى غيرهم لحسنهم عندهن «عين» ضخام الأعين حسانها
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَعِندَهُمۡ قَٰصِرَٰتُ ٱلطَّرۡفِ عِينٞ (قَاصِرَاتُ الطَّرْفِ: عَفِيفاتٌ لَا يَنْظُرْنَ إِلَى غَيْرِ أَزْوَاجِهِنَّ, عِينٌ: حِسَانُ الأَعْيُنِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Di sisi mereka ada bidadari-bidadari yang tidak liar pandangannya) yaitu bidadari-bidadari yang selalu menundukkan pandangan matanya, atau dengan kata lain mereka hanya memandang suami-suami mereka saja dan tidak memandang orang lain, karena menurut mereka suami-suami mereka adalah orang-orang yang paling cakap (dan jelita matanya) artinya mata bidadari-bidadari itu sangat jelita

t.sahih-int: As if they were [delicate] eggs, well-protected
t.asad: [as free of faults] as if they were hidden [ostrich] eggs
t.yusuf-ali: As if they were (delicate) eggs closely guarded
t.pickthall: (Pure) as they were hidden eggs (of the ostrich)
t.arberry: as if they were hidden pearls
t.hilali-khan: (Delicate and pure) as if they were (hidden) eggs (well) preserved
t.itani: As if they were closely guarded pearls.
t.mubarakpuri: as if they were Bayd Maknun.
t.qarib: just like closely guarded pearls
t.wahiduddin: like closely guarded pearls
t.shakir: As if they were eggs carefully protected
t.haleem: like protected eggs
t.maariful: as if they were eggs hidden (under feathers, protected from pollution)
t.khattab: as if they were pristine pearls
t.ghali: As if they were white nestled (jewels)
t.irving: as if they were hidden [like hatching] eggs
t.iwq: As if they were delicate eggs, well-protected

t_id.kemenag: seakan-akan mereka adalah telur (burung unta) yang tersimpan dengan baik.
t_id.sabiq: Mereka bagaikan telur burung unta yang terlindungi oleh sayap, sehingga tak tersentuh tangan dan tak terkena debu.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Seakan-akan mereka) yakni warna kulit mereka (adalah telur) burung unta (yang tersimpan dengan baik) bagaikan telur burung unta yang terlindungi oleh bulu induknya, sehingga tidak ada suatu debu pun yang menempel padanya, demikian pula warnanya, putih kekuning-kuningan, warna kulit seperti itu adalah warna kulit wanita yang paling cantik.
t_id.iwq: seakan-akan mereka adalah telur (burung unta) yang tersimpan dengan baik.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «كأنهن» في اللون «بيض» للنعام «مكنون» مستور بريشه لا يصل إليه غبار، ولونه وهو البياض في صفرة، أحسن ألوان النساء
tafsir.siraj-ar: كَأَنَّهُنَّ بَيۡضٞ مَّكۡنُونٞ (مَّكْنُونٌ: لَمْ تَمَسَّهُ الأَيْدِي)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Seakan-akan mereka) yakni warna kulit mereka (adalah telur) burung unta (yang tersimpan dengan baik) bagaikan telur burung unta yang terlindungi oleh bulu induknya, sehingga tidak ada suatu debu pun yang menempel padanya, demikian pula warnanya, putih kekuning-kuningan, warna kulit seperti itu adalah warna kulit wanita yang paling cantik

t.sahih-int: And they will approach one another, inquiring of each other
t.asad: And they will all turn to one another, asking each other [about their past lives]
t.yusuf-ali: Then they will turn to one another and question one another
t.pickthall: And some of them draw near unto others, mutually questioning
t.arberry: They advance one upon another, asking each other questions
t.hilali-khan: Then they will turn to one another, mutually questioning
t.itani: Then they will approach one another, questioning.
t.mubarakpuri: Then they will turn to one another, mutually questioning.
t.qarib: They will turn to one another, inquiring
t.wahiduddin: They will turn to one another with questions
t.shakir: Then shall some of them advance to others, questioning each other
t.haleem: They will turn to one another with questions
t.maariful: Then they will turn to each other asking questions mutually
t.khattab: Then they will turn to one another inquisitively
t.ghali: So some of them come forward to others, (Literally: some (others) asking one another (questions)
t.irving: Some of them will step forward to question one another
t.iwq: And they will approach one another, inquiring of each other

t_id.kemenag: Lalu sebahagian mereka menghadap kepada sebahagian yang lain sambil bercakap-cakap.
t_id.sabiq: Orang-orang yang dibersihkan dari dosa itu kemudian saling berhadapan dan saling berbincang tentang ihwal mereka dan tentang keadaan mereka ketika masih di dunia.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Lalu sebagian mereka menghadap) yakni sebagian penduduk surga (kepada sebagian yang lain sambil bercakap-cakap) mengenai apa yang telah mereka lakukan di dunia.
t_id.iwq: Lalu sebahagian mereka menghadap kepada sebahagian yang lain sambil bercakap-cakap.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فأقبل بعضهم» بعض أهل الجنة «على بعض يتساءلون» عما مر بهم في الدنيا
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Lalu sebagian mereka menghadap) yakni sebagian penduduk surga (kepada sebagian yang lain sambil bercakap-cakap) mengenai apa yang telah mereka lakukan di dunia

ar: قَالَ قَاۤئِلࣱ مِّنۡهُمۡ إِنِّی كَانَ لِی قَرِینࣱ
ar_simple: قَالَ قَائِلٌ مِنْهُمْ إِنِّي كَانَ لِي قَرِينٌ
transliteration: qāla qāilun min'hum innī kāna lī qarīnun

t.sahih-int: A speaker among them will say, "Indeed, I had a companion [on earth]
t.asad: One of them speaks thus: “Behold, I had [on earth] a close companion
t.yusuf-ali: One of them will start the talk and say: "I had an intimate companion (on the earth)
t.pickthall: A speaker of them saith: Lo! I had a comrade
t.arberry: One of them says, 'I had a comrade
t.hilali-khan: A speaker of them will say: "Verily, I had a companion (in the world)
t.itani: One of them will say, “I used to have a friend.
t.mubarakpuri: A speaker of them will say: "Verily, I had a companion (in the world),"
t.qarib: One of them says" I used to have a friend [on earth]
t.wahiduddin: one of them will say, "I had a friend
t.shakir: A speaker from among them shall say: Surely I had a comrade of mine
t.haleem: one will say, ‘I had a close companion on earth
t.maariful: A speaker from them will say, “I had a companion (in the worldly life)
t.khattab: One of them will say, “I once had a companion ˹in the world˺
t.ghali: A speaker of them says, "Surely I used to have a comrade
t.irving: Someone among them will speak up and say: "Once there was a soulmate of mine
t.iwq: A speaker among them will say, "Indeed, I had a companion on earth

t_id.kemenag: Berkatalah salah seorang di antara mereka: "Sesungguhnya aku dahulu (di dunia) mempunyai seorang teman,
t_id.sabiq: Saat itu salah seorang dari mereka berkata, "Dulu aku punya seorang teman yang musyrik. Ia selalu mendebatku dalam masalah agama dan ajaran-ajaran yang dibawa oleh al-Qur'ân."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Berkatalah salah seorang di antara mereka, "Sesungguhnya aku dahulu di dunia mempunyai seorang teman) yakni teman yang ingkar kepada adanya hari berbangkit.
t_id.iwq: Berkatalah salat seorang di antara mereka: "Sesungguhnya aku dahulu (di dunia) mempunyai seorang teman,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قال قائل منهم إني كان لي قرين» صاحب ينكر البعث
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالَ قَآئِلٞ مِّنۡهُمۡ إِنِّي كَانَ لِي قَرِينٞ (قَرِينٌ: صَاحِبٌ مُلَازِمٌ لِي)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Berkatalah salah seorang di antara mereka, "Sesungguhnya aku dahulu di dunia mempunyai seorang teman) yakni teman yang ingkar kepada adanya hari berbangkit

t.sahih-int: Who would say, 'Are you indeed of those who believe
t.asad: who was wont to ask [me], ‘Why - art thou really one of those who believe it to be true
t.yusuf-ali: Who used to say, 'what! art thou amongst those who bear witness to the Truth (of the Message)
t.pickthall: Who used to say: Art thou in truth of those who put faith (in his words)
t.arberry: who would say, "Are you a confirmer
t.hilali-khan: Who used to say: "Are you among those who believe (in resurrection after death)
t.itani: Who used to say, “Are you of those who believe?
t.mubarakpuri: "Who used to say: `Are you among those who believe.
t.qarib: who used to say to me, are you of those who believe
t.wahiduddin: who used to ask, 'Do you really believe that
t.shakir: Who said: What! are you indeed of those who accept (the truth)
t.haleem: who used to ask me, “Do you really believe that
t.maariful: who used to say (to me), “Are you one of those who believe
t.khattab: who used to ask ˹me˺, ‘Do you actually believe ˹in resurrection˺
t.ghali: He (always) said, Are you surely of the ones who indeed count it sincerely (verified)
t.irving: who used to say: ´Have you become convinced
t.iwq: Who would say, 'Are you verily of those who believe

t_id.kemenag: yang berkata: "Apakah kamu sungguh-sungguh termasuk orang-orang yang membenarkan (hari berbangkit)?
t_id.sabiq: "Temanku itu," katanya melanjutkan, berkata, "Apakah kamu mempercayai adanya kebangkitan setelah mati, perhitungan dan pembalasan?
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Yang berkata,) kepadaku dengan nada yang mengejek, ('Apakah kamu sungguh-sungguh termasuk orang-orang yang membenarkan) adanya hari berbangkit?
t_id.iwq: yang berkata: "Apakah kamu sungguh-sungguh termasuk orang-orang yang membenarkan (hari berbangkit)?

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «يقول» لي تبكيتا «أئنك لمن المصدقين» بالبعث
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Yang berkata,) kepadaku dengan nada yang mengejek, ('Apakah kamu sungguh-sungguh termasuk orang-orang yang membenarkan) adanya hari berbangkit

ar: أَءِذَا مِتۡنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابࣰا وَعِظَـٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَدِینُونَ
ar_simple: أَإِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا وَعِظَامًا أَإِنَّا لَمَدِينُونَ
transliteration: a-idhā mit'nā wakunnā turāban waʿiẓāman a-innā lamadīnūna

t.sahih-int: That when we have died and become dust and bones, we will indeed be recompensed
t.asad: [that] after we have died and become mere dust and bones we shall, forsooth, be brought to judgment?”’
t.yusuf-ali: When we die and become dust and bones, shall we indeed receive rewards and punishments
t.pickthall: Can we, when we are dead and have become mere dust and bones - can we (then) verily be brought to book
t.arberry: What, when we are dead and become dust and bones, shall we indeed be requited
t.hilali-khan: (That) when we die and become dust and bones, shall we indeed (be raised up) to receive reward or punishment (according to our deeds)
t.itani: That after we die and become dust and bones, we will be called to account?”
t.mubarakpuri: (That) when we die and become dust and bones, shall we indeed be indebted (Madinun)"'
t.qarib: that, when we have died and become dust and bones, we will be brought for judgment
t.wahiduddin: after we die and become dust and bones, we shall be brought to judgement
t.shakir: What! when we are dead and have become dust and bones, shall we then be certainly brought to judgment
t.haleem: after we die and become dust and bone, we shall be brought for judgement?”’
t.maariful: Is it when we have died and become dust and bones? Is it true that we are going to be recompensed (for our deeds)?”
t.khattab: When we are dead and reduced to dust and bones, will we really be brought to judgment?’”
t.ghali: When we die and are dust and bones, will we surely be doomed (Or: judged) indeed
t.irving: When we have, died and become dust and bones, will we he called to account
t.iwq: That when we have died and become dust and bones, we will verily be recompensed

t_id.kemenag: Apakah bila kita telah mati dan kita telah menjadi tanah dan tulang belulang, apakah sesungguhnya kita benar-benar (akan dibangkitkan) untuk diberi pembalasan?"
t_id.sabiq: Apakah, setelah kita binasa dan menjadi debu dan tulang belulang, kita akan hidup lagi untuk diperhitungkan dan dibalas segala amal perbuatan kita?"
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Apakah apabila kita telah mati dan kita telah menjadi tanah dan tulang-belulang, apakah sesungguhnya kita) kedua huruf Hamzah pada ketiga tempat yang disebutkan di atas, yaitu A-innaka, A-idzaa dan A-innaa boleh dibaca Tahqiq dan boleh pula dibaca Tas-hil (benar-benar akan dibangkitkan untuk diberi pembalasan?') maksudnya akan dibalas dan dihisab? Ia ternyata ingkar kepada hal tersebut.
t_id.iwq: Apakah bila kita telah mati dan kita telah menjadi tanah dan tulang belulang, apakah sesungguhnya kita benar-benar (akan dibangkitkan) untuk diberi pembalasan?"

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «أئذا متنا وكنا ترابا وعظاما أئنا» في الهمزتين في الثلاثة مواضع ما تقدم «لمدينون» مجزيون ومحاسبون؟ أنكر ذلك أيضا
tafsir.siraj-ar: أَءِذَا مِتۡنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابٗا وَعِظَٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَدِينُونَ (لَمَدِينُونَ: لَمَجْزِيُّونَ، وَمُحَاسَبُونَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Apakah apabila kita telah mati dan kita telah menjadi tanah dan tulang-belulang, apakah sesungguhnya kita) kedua huruf Hamzah pada ketiga tempat yang disebutkan di atas, yaitu A-innaka, A-idzaa dan A-innaa boleh dibaca Tahqiq dan boleh pula dibaca Tas-hil (benar-benar akan dibangkitkan untuk diberi pembalasan?') maksudnya akan dibalas dan dihisab? Ia ternyata ingkar kepada hal tersebut

t.sahih-int: He will say, "Would you [care to] look
t.asad: [And] he adds: “Would you like to look [and see him]?” –
t.yusuf-ali: (A voice) said: "Would ye like to look down
t.pickthall: He saith: Will ye look
t.arberry: He says, 'Are you looking down
t.hilali-khan: (The man) said: "Will you look down
t.itani: He will say, “Will you have a look?”
t.mubarakpuri: (The speaker) said: "Will you look down"
t.qarib: And he will add, "Shall we look for him
t.wahiduddin: Then he will say, "Shall we look for him
t.shakir: He shall say: Will you look on
t.haleem: Then he will say, ‘Shall we look for him?’
t.maariful: He (the speaker) will say (to other people in Paradise) “Would you like to have a look (at Jahannam to find out what happened to that companion of mine)?”
t.khattab: He will ˹then˺ ask, “Would you care to see ˹his fate˺?”
t.ghali: He says, "Are you (all) viewing (him)
t.irving: He will say: "Will you (all) just take a look
t.iwq: He will say, "Would you care to look

t_id.kemenag: Berkata pulalah ia: "Maukah kamu meninjau (temanku itu)?"
t_id.sabiq: Orang itu melanjutkan berkata kepada teman-temannya, "Wahai penghuni surga, apakah kalian menyaksikan penghuni neraka sehingga melihat temanku itu?"
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Berkata pulalah ia) yaitu penghuni surga yang mengatakan demikian kepada temannya ('Maukah kamu melihat keadaan temanku itu?'") maksudnya bersama-sama untuk melihat apa yang dialami temannya di dalam neraka? Temannya menjawab, "Tidak mau."
t_id.iwq: Berkata pulalah ia: "Maukah kamu meninjau (temanku itu)?"

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قال» ذلك القائل لإخوانه: «هل أنتم مطلعون» معي إلى النار لننظر حاله؟ فيقولون: لا
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Berkata pulalah ia) yaitu penghuni surga yang mengatakan demikian kepada temannya ('Maukah kamu melihat keadaan temanku itu?'") maksudnya bersama-sama untuk melihat apa yang dialami temannya di dalam neraka? Temannya menjawab, "Tidak mau

t.sahih-int: And he will look and see him in the midst of the Hellfire
t.asad: and then he looks and sees that [companion of his] in the midst of the blazing fire
t.yusuf-ali: He looked down and saw him in the midst of the Fire
t.pickthall: Then looketh he and seeth him in the depth of hell
t.arberry: Then he looks, and sees him in the midst of Hell
t.hilali-khan: So he looked down and saw him in the midst of the Fire
t.itani: He will look, and will see him in the pit of Hell.
t.mubarakpuri: So he looked down and saw him in the midst of the Fire.
t.qarib: And he looks and sees [his former companion] in the midst of Hell
t.wahiduddin: Then he will look and see him in the midst of the Fire
t.shakir: Then he looked down and saw him in the midst of hell
t.haleem: He will look down and see him in the midst of the Fire
t.maariful: So he will look and will see him in the middle of Jahannam
t.khattab: Then he ˹and the others˺ will look and spot him in the midst of the Hellfire
t.ghali: So he views (him), and then sees him in the (deepest) level of the Hell-Fire
t.irving: So he did look down and saw he was [standing] in the midst of Hades
t.iwq: And he will look and see him in the midst of the Hellfire

t_id.kemenag: Maka ia meninjaunya, lalu dia melihat temannya itu di tengah-tengah neraka menyala-nyala.
t_id.sabiq: Pandangannya pun tertuju ke neraka. Lalu ia melihat teman lamanya itu berada di tengah-tengahnya: tersiksa oleh api neraka.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka ia meninjaunya) yakni orang yang mengatakan demikian itu dari sebagian jendela surga (lalu ia melihat temannya itu) yaitu temannya yang ingkar kepada adanya hari berbangkit itu (di tengah-tengah neraka menyala-nyala) berada di tengah-tengah neraka Jahim.
t_id.iwq: Maka ia meninjaunya, lalu dia melihat temannya itu di tengah-tengah neraka menyala-nyala.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فاطلع» ذلك القائلون من بعض كوى الجنة «فرآه» أي رأى قرينه «في سواء الجحيم» في وسط النار
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka ia meninjaunya) yakni orang yang mengatakan demikian itu dari sebagian jendela surga (lalu ia melihat temannya itu) yaitu temannya yang ingkar kepada adanya hari berbangkit itu (di tengah-tengah neraka menyala-nyala) berada di tengah-tengah neraka Jahim

t.sahih-int: He will say, "By Allah, you almost ruined me
t.asad: and says: “By God! Verily, thou hast almost destroyed me [too, O my erstwhile companion]
t.yusuf-ali: He said: "By Allah! thou wast little short of bringing me to perdition
t.pickthall: He saith: By Allah, thou verily didst all but cause my ruin
t.arberry: He says, 'By God, wellnigh thou didst destroy me
t.hilali-khan: He said: "By Allah! You have nearly ruined me
t.itani: He will say, “By God, you almost ruined me.
t.mubarakpuri: He said: "By Allah! You have nearly ruined me."
t.qarib: He says to him, "By God, you almost ruined me
t.wahiduddin: He will say, "By God! You almost brought me to ruin
t.shakir: He shall say: By Allah! you had almost caused me to perish
t.haleem: and say to him, ‘By God, you almost brought me to ruin
t.maariful: He (the speaker) will say (to his companion seen in Jahannam ), “By Allah, you were going almost to ruin me
t.khattab: He will ˹then˺ say, “By Allah! You nearly ruined me
t.ghali: He says, "By Allah, (The Arabic is ta-llahi; which a stronger oath than the more usual wa-llahi) decidedly you were almost about to topple me down indeed
t.irving: He said: "By God, you have almost ruined me
t.iwq: And he will say, "By Allah, you almost ruined me

t_id.kemenag: Ia berkata (pula): "Demi Allah, sesungguhnya kamu benar-benar hampir mencelakakanku,
t_id.sabiq: Ketika melihatnya, ia berkata, "Demi Allah, kamu hampir saja membinasakanku di dunia dulu, kalau aku mematuhimu bersikap kufur dan berbuat maksiat.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Ia berkata pula) dengan nada mengejek, ("Demi Allah, sesungguhnya) lafal In di sini adalah bentuk Takhfif dari Inna (kamu benar-benar hampir) kamu hampir saja (mencelakakanku) membinasakan aku melalui penyesatanmu itu.
t_id.iwq: Ia berkata (pula): "Demi Allah, sesungguhnya kamu benar-benar hampir mencelakakanku,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قال» له تشميتا «تالله إن» مخففة من الثقيلة «كدت» قاربت «لتردين» لتهلكني بإغوائك
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالَ تَٱللَّهِ إِن كِدتَّ لَتُرۡدِينِ (إِنْ كِدتَّ: إِنَّكَ قَارَبْتَ, لَتُرْدِينِ: لَتُهْلِكُنِي بِضَلَالِكَ، وَإِغْوَائِكَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Ia berkata pula) dengan nada mengejek, ("Demi Allah, sesungguhnya) lafal In di sini adalah bentuk Takhfif dari Inna (kamu benar-benar hampir) kamu hampir saja (mencelakakanku) membinasakan aku melalui penyesatanmu itu

ar: وَلَوۡلَا نِعۡمَةُ رَبِّی لَكُنتُ مِنَ ٱلۡمُحۡضَرِینَ
ar_simple: وَلَوْلَا نِعْمَةُ رَبِّي لَكُنْتُ مِنَ الْمُحْضَرِينَ
transliteration: walawlā niʿ'matu rabbī lakuntu mina l-muḥ'ḍarīna

t.sahih-int: If not for the favor of my Lord, I would have been of those brought in [to Hell]
t.asad: for had it not been for my Sustainer’s favour, I would surely be [now] among those who are given over [to suffering]
t.yusuf-ali: Had it not been for the Grace of my Lord, I should certainly have been among those brought (there)
t.pickthall: And had it not been for the favour of my Lord, I too had been of those haled forth (to doom)
t.arberry: But for my Lord's blessing, I were one of the arraigned
t.hilali-khan: Had it not been for the Grace of my Lord, I would certainly have been among those brought forth (to Hell)
t.itani: Were it not for the grace of my Lord, I would have been among the arraigned.”
t.mubarakpuri: "Had it not been for the grace of my Lord, I would certainly have been among those brought forth (to Hell)."
t.qarib: Were It not for the grace of my Lord, I would have been with those taken [to Hell]
t.wahiduddin: If it had not been for the blessing of my Lord, I would also have been taken to Hell
t.shakir: And had it not been for the favor of my Lord, I would certainly have been among those brought up
t.haleem: Had it not been for the grace of my Lord, I too would have been taken to Hell.’
t.maariful: But for the favor of my Lord, I would have been among those produced for punishment.”
t.khattab: Had it not been for the grace of my Lord, I ˹too˺ would have certainly been among those brought ˹to Hell˺.”
t.ghali: And had it not been for the favor of my Lord, indeed I would have been among the ones presented forward
t.irving: If it were not for my Lord´s favor, I´d have been made to appear
t.iwq: If not for the favor of my Lord, I would have been of those brought in to Hell

t_id.kemenag: jikalau tidaklah karena nikmat Tuhanku pastilah aku termasuk orang-orang yang diseret (ke neraka).
t_id.sabiq: Kalau tidak karena nikmat Tuhanku yang berupa hidayah dan restu-Nya kepadaku untuk beriman kepada Allah dan kebangkitan, tentu aku akan seperti kamu: dijebloskan ke dalam siksa.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Jika tidak karena nikmat Rabbku) atas diriku yaitu berupa iman (pastilah aku termasuk orang-orang yang diseret) bersamamu ke dalam neraka. Dan penduduk surga berkata,
t_id.iwq: jikalau tidaklah karena nikmat Tuhanku pastilah aku termasuk orang-orang yang diseret (ke neraka).

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ولو لا نعمة ربي» عليَّ بالإيمان «لكنت من المحضرين» معك في النار وتقول أهل الجنة
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَلَوۡلَا نِعۡمَةُ رَبِّي لَكُنتُ مِنَ ٱلۡمُحۡضَرِينَ (الْمُحْضَرِينَ: مَنْ أُحْضِرُوا فِي العَذَابِ مَعَكَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Jika tidak karena nikmat Rabbku) atas diriku yaitu berupa iman (pastilah aku termasuk orang-orang yang diseret) bersamamu ke dalam neraka. Dan penduduk surga berkata

t.sahih-int: Then, are we not to die
t.asad: But then, [O my friends in paradise,] is it [really] so that we are not to die
t.yusuf-ali: Is it (the case) that we shall not die
t.pickthall: Are we then not to die
t.arberry: What, do we then not die
t.hilali-khan: (Allah informs about that true believer that he said): "Are we then not to die (any more)
t.itani: “We will not die.
t.mubarakpuri: "Are we then not to die (any more)"
t.qarib: Then, [he says to those in paradise], "Will we really not die
t.wahiduddin: Then he will say [to his blessed companions], "Are we not going to die
t.shakir: Is it then that we are not going to die
t.haleem: Then he will say [to his blessed companions], ‘Are we never to die again after our earlier death
t.maariful: (Then the speaker will address other people of Paradise in delight and wonder, saying,) “Are we not then to die anymore
t.khattab: ˹Then he will ask his fellow believers,˺ “Can you imagine that we will never die
t.ghali: Then in no way will we be dead
t.irving: Aren´t we mortal
t.iwq: Then, are we not to die

t_id.kemenag: Maka apakah kita tidak akan mati?,
t_id.sabiq: Apakah kita akan kekal dalam kenikmatan surga dan selamanya tidak akan mati selain mati yang pertama di dunia? Dan apakah kita tidak akan merasakan siksa setelah masuk surga?
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka apakah kita tidak akan mati.)
t_id.iwq: Maka apakah kita tidak akan mati?,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «أفما نحن بميتين»
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Maka apakah kita tidak akan mati

ar: إِلَّا مَوۡتَتَنَا ٱلۡأُولَىٰ وَمَا نَحۡنُ بِمُعَذَّبِینَ
ar_simple: إِلَّا مَوْتَتَنَا الْأُولَىٰ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمُعَذَّبِينَ
transliteration: illā mawtatanā l-ūlā wamā naḥnu bimuʿadhabīna

t.sahih-int: Except for our first death, and we will not be punished
t.asad: [again,] beyond our previous death, and that we shall never [again] be made to suffer
t.yusuf-ali: Except our first death, and that we shall not be punished
t.pickthall: Saving our former death, and are we not to be punished
t.arberry: except for our first death, and are we not chastised
t.hilali-khan: Except our first death, and we shall not be punished? (after we have entered Paradise)
t.itani: Except for our first death, and we will not be punished.”
t.mubarakpuri: "Except our first death, and we shall not be punished"
t.qarib: except for our first death, and will we really not be punished
t.wahiduddin: except for our first death? Are we not going to be punished
t.shakir: Except our previous death? And we shall not be chastised
t.haleem: Shall we never suffer
t.maariful: beyond our first death, nor are we going to be punished?”
t.khattab: except our first death, nor be punished ˹like the others˺?”
t.ghali: Except for our first death, and in no way will we be tormented
t.irving: except for our first death? Will we not be punished
t.iwq: Except for our first death, and we will not be punished

t_id.kemenag: melainkan hanya kematian kita yang pertama saja (di dunia), dan kita tidak akan disiksa (di akhirat ini)?
t_id.sabiq: Apakah kita akan kekal dalam kenikmatan surga dan selamanya tidak akan mati selain mati yang pertama di dunia? Dan apakah kita tidak akan merasakan siksa setelah masuk surga?
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Melainkan hanya kematian kita yang pertama) yakni kematian kita di dunia (dan kita tidak akan disiksa di akhirat ini?") Istifham atau kata tanya di sini mengandung makna menetapkan kenikmatan yang mereka rasakan dan sebagai ungkapan rasa syukur mereka atas nikmat yang telah dilimpahkan Allah kepada diri mereka, yaitu mereka dijadikan hidup abadi dengan penuh kenikmatan dan tidak disiksa untuk selama-lamanya.
t_id.iwq: melainkan hanya kematian kita yang pertama saja (di dunia), dan kita tidak akan disiksa (di akhirat ini)?

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إلا موتتنا الأولى» أي التي في الدنيا «وما نحن بمعذبين» هو استفهام تلذذ وتحدُّث بنعمة الله تعالى من تأبيد الحياة وعدم التعذيب
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِلَّا مَوۡتَتَنَا ٱلۡأُولَىٰ وَمَا نَحۡنُ بِمُعَذَّبِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Melainkan hanya kematian kita yang pertama) yakni kematian kita di dunia (dan kita tidak akan disiksa di akhirat ini?") Istifham atau kata tanya di sini mengandung makna menetapkan kenikmatan yang mereka rasakan dan sebagai ungkapan rasa syukur mereka atas nikmat yang telah dilimpahkan Allah kepada diri mereka, yaitu mereka dijadikan hidup abadi dengan penuh kenikmatan dan tidak disiksa untuk selama-lamanya

t.sahih-int: Indeed, this is the great attainment
t.asad: Verily, this - this indeed - is the triumph supreme!”
t.yusuf-ali: Verily this is the supreme achievement
t.pickthall: Lo! this is the supreme triumph
t.arberry: This is indeed the mighty triumph
t.hilali-khan: Truly, this is the supreme success
t.itani: This is the supreme triumph.
t.mubarakpuri: Truly, this is the supreme success!
t.qarib: Truly, this is the ultimate success
t.wahiduddin: Truly, this is a great victory
t.shakir: Most surely this is the mighty achievement
t.haleem: This truly is the supreme triumph!’
t.maariful: This is, indeed, the great achievement
t.khattab: This is truly the ultimate triumph
t.ghali: Surely this is indeed that which is magnificent triumph
t.irving: This is the splendid Achievement!´
t.iwq: Indeed, this is the great attainment

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya ini benar-benar kemenangan yang besar.
t_id.sabiq: Sesungguhnya kemuliaan di surga yang diberikan Allah kepada kita adalah suatu kemenangan yang amat besar. Kemuliaan itu juga merupakan keselamatan terbesar dari siksa Allah yang selalu kita takuti di dunia."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya ini) yakni apa yang Aku jelaskan mengenai keadaan penduduk surga (benar-benar kemenangan yang besar.)
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya ini benar-benar kemenangan yang besar.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إن هذا» الذي ذكرت لأهل الجنة «لهو الفوز العظيم»
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya ini) yakni apa yang Aku jelaskan mengenai keadaan penduduk surga (benar-benar kemenangan yang besar)

t.sahih-int: For the like of this let the workers [on earth] work
t.asad: For the like of this, then, let them labour, those who labour [in God’s way]
t.yusuf-ali: For the like of this let all strive, who wish to strive
t.pickthall: For the like of this, then, let the workers work
t.arberry: for the like of this let the workers work
t.hilali-khan: For the like of this let the workers work
t.itani: For the like of this let the workers work.
t.mubarakpuri: For the like of this let the workers work.
t.qarib: This is what everyone should strive to attain
t.wahiduddin: It is for the like of this that all should strive
t.shakir: For the like of this then let the workers work
t.haleem: Everyone should strive to attain this
t.maariful: For this kind (of achievement), all workers must work
t.khattab: For such ˹honour˺ all should strive
t.ghali: For the like of this let the doers do (good deeds)
t.irving: For such as this let workers toil
t.iwq: For the like of this let the workers on earth work

t_id.kemenag: Untuk kemenangan serupa ini hendaklah berusaha orang-orang yang bekerja"
t_id.sabiq: Untuk mendapatkan kemuliaan seperti yang diterima oleh orang-orang Mukmin di akhirat itu, hendaknya orang-orang yang berbuat di dunia itu berusaha untuk mendapatkan seperti yang mereka dapatkan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Untuk kemenangan serupa ini hendaklah berusaha orang-orang yang beramal) menurut suatu pendapat, bahwa perkataan ini ditujukan kepada mereka. Dan menurut pendapat yang lain disebutkan, bahwa merekalah yang mengatakan demikian.
t_id.iwq: Untuk kemenangan serupa ini hendaklah berusaha orang-orang yang bekerja"

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «لمثل هذا فليعمل العاملون» قيل يقال لهم ذلك، وقيل هم يقولونه
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Untuk kemenangan serupa ini hendaklah berusaha orang-orang yang beramal) menurut suatu pendapat, bahwa perkataan ini ditujukan kepada mereka. Dan menurut pendapat yang lain disebutkan, bahwa merekalah yang mengatakan demikian

ar: أَذَ ٰلِكَ خَیۡرࣱ نُّزُلًا أَمۡ شَجَرَةُ ٱلزَّقُّومِ
ar_simple: أَذَٰلِكَ خَيْرٌ نُزُلًا أَمْ شَجَرَةُ الزَّقُّومِ
transliteration: adhālika khayrun nuzulan am shajaratu l-zaqūmi

t.sahih-int: Is Paradise a better accommodation or the tree of zaqqum
t.asad: Is such [a paradise] the better welcome - or the [hellish] tree of deadly fruit
t.yusuf-ali: Is that the better entertainment or the Tree of Zaqqum
t.pickthall: Is this better as a welcome, or the tree of Zaqqum
t.arberry: Is that better as a hospitality, or the Tree of Ez-Zakkoum
t.hilali-khan: Is that (Paradise) better entertainment or the tree of Zaqqum (a horrible tree in Hell)
t.itani: Is this a better hospitality, or the Tree of Bitterness?
t.mubarakpuri: Is that (Paradise) better entertainment or the tree of Zaqqum
t.qarib: Is Paradise a better place to be, or the tree of Bitterness
t.wahiduddin: Is that better by way of hospitality or the Zaqqum tree
t.shakir: Is this better as an entertainment or the tree of Zaqqum
t.haleem: Is this the better welcome, or the tree of Zaqqum
t.maariful: Is that (blissful Paradise) better for hospitality or the tree of zaqqūm
t.khattab: Is this ˹bliss˺ a better accommodation or the tree of Zaqqûm
t.ghali: Is this a more charitable (i.e., better) hospitality, or even the Tree of Az-Zaqqum
t.irving: Is that a better welcome or is the Infernal Tree
t.iwq: Is Paradise a better accommodation or the tree of zaqqum

t_id.kemenag: (Makanan surga) itukah hidangan yang lebih baik ataukah pohon zaqqum.
t_id.sabiq: Apakah rezeki tertentu yang telah disediakan untuk penghuni surga itu lebih baik ataukah pohon zaqqûm yang tersedia untuk penghuni neraka?
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Apakah yang demikian itu) hal-hal yang telah disebutkan bagi ahli surga itu (merupakan hidangan yang lebih baik) suguhan atau hidangan yang diperuntukkan menjamu tamu atau orang yang menginap (ataukah pohon zaqqum) yang disediakan buat ahli neraka; pohon zaqqum adalah pohon yang paling buruk dan sangat pahit rasanya, tempat asalnya adalah Tihamah. Allah menumbuhkan pohon itu di dalam neraka Jahim, sebagaimana yang akan diterangkan nanti.
t_id.iwq: (Makanan surga) itukah hidangan yang lebih baik ataukah pohon zaqqum.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «أذلك» المذكور لهم «خير نزلا» وهو ما يعدّ للنازل من ضيف وغيره «أم شجرة الزقوم» المعدة لأهل النار وهي من أخبث الشجر المرّ بتهامة ينبتها الله في الجحيم كما سيأتي
tafsir.siraj-ar: أَذَٰلِكَ خَيۡرٞ نُّزُلًا أَمۡ شَجَرَةُ ٱلزَّقُّومِ (نُّزُلًا: ضِيَافَةً, شَجَرَةُ الزَّقُّومِ: شَجَرَةٌ خَبِيثَةٌ، مَلْعُونَةٌ، مِنْ طَعَامِ أَهْلِ النَّارِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Apakah yang demikian itu) hal-hal yang telah disebutkan bagi ahli surga itu (merupakan hidangan yang lebih baik) suguhan atau hidangan yang diperuntukkan menjamu tamu atau orang yang menginap (ataukah pohon zaqqum) yang disediakan buat ahli neraka; pohon zaqqum adalah pohon yang paling buruk dan sangat pahit rasanya, tempat asalnya adalah Tihamah. Allah menumbuhkan pohon itu di dalam neraka Jahim, sebagaimana yang akan diterangkan nanti

t.sahih-int: Indeed, We have made it a torment for the wrongdoers
t.asad: Verily, We have caused it to be a trial for evildoers
t.yusuf-ali: For We have truly made it (as) a trial for the wrong-doers
t.pickthall: Lo! We have appointed it a torment for wrong-doers
t.arberry: We have appointed it as a trial for the evildoers
t.hilali-khan: Truly We have made it (as) a trail for the Zalimun (polytheists, disbelievers, wrong-doers, etc)
t.itani: We made it an ordeal for the unjust.
t.mubarakpuri: Truly, We have made it (as) a trial for the wrongdoers.
t.qarib: We have made [this tree] a punishment for the unjust
t.wahiduddin: which We have made as a test for the wrongdoers
t.shakir: Surely We have made it to be a trial to the unjust
t.haleem: which we have made a test for the evildoers
t.maariful: We have made it a test for the unjust
t.khattab: We have surely made it a test for the wrongdoers
t.ghali: Surely We have made it as a temptation (Or: trial) for the unjust
t.irving: We have placed it as a trial for wrongdoers
t.iwq: Indeed, We have made it a torment for those who do wrong

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya Kami menjadikan pohon zaqqum itu sebagai siksaan bagi orang-orang yang zalim.
t_id.sabiq: Sesungguhnya Kami menjadikan pohon zaqqûm itu sebagai bencana dan siksaan bagi orang-orang musyrik di akhirat.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya Kami menjadikan pohon zaqqum itu) artinya ditumbuhkannya pohon tersebut di dalam neraka (sebagai fitnah bagi orang-orang yang lalim) yakni orang-orang kafir Mekah, karena mereka telah mengatakan, bahwa api itu membakar pohon, mana mungkin di dalam neraka dapat ditumbuhkan pohon.
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya Kami menjadikan pohon zaqqum itu sebagai siksaan bagi orang-orang yang zalim.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إنا جعلناها» بذلك «فتنة للظالمين» أي الكافرين من أهل مكة، إذ قالوا: النار تحرق الشجر فكيف تنبته
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِنَّا جَعَلۡنَٰهَا فِتۡنَةٗ لِّلظَّـٰلِمِينَ (فِتْنَةً: ابْتِلَاءً لَهُمْ؛ حَيْثُ كَذَّبُوا بِوُجُودِ شَجَرَةٍ فيِ النَّارِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya Kami menjadikan pohon zaqqum itu) artinya ditumbuhkannya pohon tersebut di dalam neraka (sebagai fitnah bagi orang-orang yang lalim) yakni orang-orang kafir Mekah, karena mereka telah mengatakan, bahwa api itu membakar pohon, mana mungkin di dalam neraka dapat ditumbuhkan pohon

ar: إِنَّهَا شَجَرَةࣱ تَخۡرُجُ فِیۤ أَصۡلِ ٱلۡجَحِیمِ
ar_simple: إِنَّهَا شَجَرَةٌ تَخْرُجُ فِي أَصْلِ الْجَحِيمِ
transliteration: innahā shajaratun takhruju fī aṣli l-jaḥīmi

t.sahih-int: Indeed, it is a tree issuing from the bottom of the Hellfire
t.asad: for, behold, it is a tree that grows in the very heart of the blazing fire [of hell]
t.yusuf-ali: For it is a tree that springs out of the bottom of Hell-Fire
t.pickthall: Lo! it is a tree that springeth in the heart of hell
t.arberry: It is a tree that comes forth in the root of Hell
t.hilali-khan: Verily, it is a tree that springs out of the bottom of Hell-fire
t.itani: It is a tree that grows from the bottom of Hell.
t.mubarakpuri: Verily, it is a tree that springs out of the bottom of Hell-fire,
t.qarib: It is a tree that grows in the heart of Hell
t.wahiduddin: For it is a tree that springs out of the bottom of Hellfire
t.shakir: Surely it is a tree that-grows in the bottom of the hell
t.haleem: This tree grows in the heart of the blazing Fire
t.maariful: It is a tree that comes forth in the bottom of Jahannam
t.khattab: Indeed, it is a tree that grows in the depths of Hell
t.ghali: Surely it is a tree that comes out (Literally: goes out) in the root of Hell-Fire
t.irving: It is a tree that rises from the depths of Hades
t.iwq: Indeed, it is a tree issuing from the bottom of the Hellfire

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya dia adalah sebatang pohon yang ke luar dan dasar neraka yang menyala.
t_id.sabiq: Zaqqûm itu adalah pohon yang berada di tengah-tengah neraka jahim. Pohon itu tumbuh dan berasal dari api.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya dia adalah sebatang pohon yang keluar dari dasar neraka yang menyala) yakni dari dasar neraka Jahanam, dan ranting-rantingnya mencuat sampai ke relung-relungnya.
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya dia adalah sebatang pohon yang ke luar dan dasar neraka yang menyala.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إنها شجرة تخرج في أصل الجحيم» أي قعر جهنم، وأغصانها ترتفع إلى دركاتها
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِنَّهَا شَجَرَةٞ تَخۡرُجُ فِيٓ أَصۡلِ ٱلۡجَحِيمِ (أَصْلِ الْجَحِيمِ: قَعْرِ جَهَنَّمَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya dia adalah sebatang pohon yang keluar dari dasar neraka yang menyala) yakni dari dasar neraka Jahanam, dan ranting-rantingnya mencuat sampai ke relung-relungnya

t.sahih-int: Its emerging fruit as if it was heads of the devils
t.asad: its fruit [as repulsive] as satans’ heads
t.yusuf-ali: The shoots of its fruit-stalks are like the heads of devils
t.pickthall: Its crop is as it were the heads of devils
t.arberry: its spathes are as the heads of Satans
t.hilali-khan: The shoots of its fruit-stalks are like the heads of Shayatin (devils)
t.itani: Its fruits are like the devils’ heads.
t.mubarakpuri: The shoots of its fruit stalks are like the heads of Shayatin.
t.qarib: Its fruit like devils' heads
t.wahiduddin: and its fruits are like devils' heads
t.shakir: Its produce is as it were the heads of the serpents
t.haleem: and its fruits are like devils’ heads
t.maariful: Its fruits are like the heads of devils
t.khattab: bearing fruit like devils’ heads
t.ghali: Its spathes are as the heads of Shayatun. (Ever-vicious (ones), i.e., devils
t.irving: Its cluster [of fruit] looks like devils´ heads
t.iwq: Its emerging fruit as if it was heads of the devils

t_id.kemenag: mayangnya seperti kepala syaitan-syaitan.
t_id.sabiq: Buahnya tak indah dipandang. Bentuknya pun amat buruk. Rasa-rasanya, tak ingin mata memandang. Ia seperti kepala setan yang, meskipun belum pernah dilihat manusia, gambaran bentuknya yang jelas sudah ada dalam benaknya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Mayangnya) diserupakan dengan mayang pohon kurma (seperti kepala setan-setan) maksudnya, seperti ular-ular yang sangat buruk dan menjijikkan tampangnya.
t_id.iwq: mayangnya seperti kepala syaitan-syaitan.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «طلعها» المشبه بطلع النخل «كأنه رءوس الشياطين» الحيات القبيحة المنظر
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Mayangnya) diserupakan dengan mayang pohon kurma (seperti kepala setan-setan) maksudnya, seperti ular-ular yang sangat buruk dan menjijikkan tampangnya

ar: فَإِنَّهُمۡ لَءَاكِلُونَ مِنۡهَا فَمَالِءُونَ مِنۡهَا ٱلۡبُطُونَ
ar_simple: فَإِنَّهُمْ لَآكِلُونَ مِنْهَا فَمَالِئُونَ مِنْهَا الْبُطُونَ
transliteration: fa-innahum laākilūna min'hā famāliūna min'hā l-buṭūna

t.sahih-int: And indeed, they will eat from it and fill with it their bellies
t.asad: and they [who are lost in evil] are indeed bound to eat thereof, and to fill their bellies therewith
t.yusuf-ali: Truly they will eat thereof and fill their bellies therewith
t.pickthall: And lo! they verily must eat thereof, and fill (their) bellies therewith
t.arberry: and they eat of it, and of it fill their bellies
t.hilali-khan: Truly, they will eat thereof and fill their bellies therewith
t.itani: They will eat from it, and fill their bellies with it.
t.mubarakpuri: Truly, they will eat thereof and fill their bellies therewith.
t.qarib: and [the people in Hell] will eat from it and fill their bellies with it
t.wahiduddin: They will eat from it and fill their bellies with it
t.shakir: Then most surely they shall eat of it and fill (their) bellies with it
t.haleem: They will fill their bellies eating from it
t.maariful: So, they have to eat from it and have to fill their bellies with it
t.khattab: The evildoers will certainly ˹be left to˺ eat from it, filling up their bellies with it
t.ghali: Then surely they will indeed be eating of it, and so of it they will be filling their bellies
t.irving: they will eat some of it and fill their stomachs with it
t.iwq: And verily, they will eat from it and fill with it their bellies

t_id.kemenag: Maka sesungguhnya mereka benar-benar memakan sebagian dari buah pohon itu, maka mereka memenuhi perutnya dengan buah zaqqum itu.
t_id.sabiq: Mereka benar-benar memakan dan mengisi perutnya dengan buah pohon itu, karena tak ada apa-apa lagi yang dapat dimakan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka sesungguhnya mereka) yakni orang-orang kafir (benar-benar memakan sebagian dari pohon itu) sekalipun rasanya sangat memuakkan, karena mereka dalam keadaan sangat lapar (maka mereka memenuhi perutnya dengan buah zaqqum itu.)
t_id.iwq: Maka sesungguhnya mereka benar-benar memakan sebagian dari buah pohon itu, maka mereka memenuhi perutnya dengan buah zaqqum itu.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فإنهم» أي الكفار «لآكلون منها» مع قبحها لشدة جوعهم «فمالئون منها البطون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَإِنَّهُمۡ لَأٓكِلُونَ مِنۡهَا فَمَالِـُٔونَ مِنۡهَا ٱلۡبُطُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka sesungguhnya mereka) yakni orang-orang kafir (benar-benar memakan sebagian dari pohon itu) sekalipun rasanya sangat memuakkan, karena mereka dalam keadaan sangat lapar (maka mereka memenuhi perutnya dengan buah zaqqum itu)

ar: ثُمَّ إِنَّ لَهُمۡ عَلَیۡهَا لَشَوۡبࣰا مِّنۡ حَمِیمࣲ
ar_simple: ثُمَّ إِنَّ لَهُمْ عَلَيْهَا لَشَوْبًا مِنْ حَمِيمٍ
transliteration: thumma inna lahum ʿalayhā lashawban min ḥamīmin

t.sahih-int: Then indeed, they will have after it a mixture of scalding water
t.asad: And, behold, above all this they will be confounded with burning despair
t.yusuf-ali: Then on top of that they will be given a mixture made of boiling water
t.pickthall: And afterward, lo! thereupon they have a drink of boiling water
t.arberry: then on top of it they have a brew of boiling water
t.hilali-khan: Then on the top of that they will be given boiling water to drink so that it becomes a mixture (of boiling water and Zaqqum in their bellies)
t.itani: Then, on top of it, they will have a brew of boiling liquid.
t.mubarakpuri: Then on the top of that they will be given boiling Hamim.
t.qarib: On top of that, they will have a boiling brew to drink
t.wahiduddin: then in addition to it they shall have a draught of boiling water to drink
t.shakir: Then most surely they shall have after it to drink of a mixture prepared in boiling water
t.haleem: then drink scalding water on top of it
t.maariful: Then they will have, on top of it, a mixture made of boiling water
t.khattab: Then on top of that they will be given a blend of boiling drink
t.ghali: Thereafter on top of it surely they will have indeed an admixture of scalding (water)
t.irving: Then on top of it, they will have a concoction made from bathwater [to drink]
t.iwq: Then verily, they will have after it a mixture of scalding water

t_id.kemenag: Kemudian sesudah makan buah pohon zaqqum itu pasti mereka mendapat minuman yang bercampur dengan air yang sangat panas.
t_id.sabiq: Kemudian, setelah memakan buah dari zaqqûm itu, orang-orang musyrik akan mendapatkan campuran minuman panas yang membakar muka dan merobek perut mereka.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Kemudian sesudah makan buah pohon zaqqum itu pasti mereka mendapat minuman yang bercampur dengan air yang sangat panas) yang mereka minum, hingga bercampur di dalam perut mereka apa yang mereka makan dan apa yang mereka minum itu.
t_id.iwq: Kemudian sesudah makan buah pohon zaqqum itu pasti mereka mendapat minuman yang bercampur dengan air yang sangat panas.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ثم إن لهم عليها لشوبا من حميم» أي ماء حار يشربونه فيختلط بالمأكول منها فيصير شوبا له
tafsir.siraj-ar: ثُمَّ إِنَّ لَهُمۡ عَلَيۡهَا لَشَوۡبٗا مِّنۡ حَمِيمٖ (لَشَوْبًا: لَخَلْطًا، وَمِزَاجًا, حَمِيمٍ: مِنْ مَاءٍ حَارٍّ بَالِغِ الحَرَارَةِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Kemudian sesudah makan buah pohon zaqqum itu pasti mereka mendapat minuman yang bercampur dengan air yang sangat panas) yang mereka minum, hingga bercampur di dalam perut mereka apa yang mereka makan dan apa yang mereka minum itu

t.sahih-int: Then indeed, their return will be to the Hellfire
t.asad: And once again: Verily, the blazing fire is their ultimate goal –
t.yusuf-ali: Then shall their return be to the (Blazing) Fire
t.pickthall: And afterward, lo! their return is surely unto hell
t.arberry: then their return is unto Hell
t.hilali-khan: Then thereafter, verily, their return is to the flaming fire of Hell
t.itani: Then their return will be to the Blaze.
t.mubarakpuri: Then thereafter, verily, their return is to the flaming fire of Hell.
t.qarib: Then they will return to Hell
t.wahiduddin: then surely they shall return to Hell
t.shakir: Then most surely their return shall be to hell
t.haleem: then return to the blazing Fire
t.maariful: Then, their final return is to the Fire
t.khattab: Then they will ultimately return to ˹their place in˺ Hell
t.ghali: Thereafter surely their return indeed is to Hell-Fire
t.irving: Then their return must be to Hades
t.iwq: Then verily, their return will be to the Hellfire

t_id.kemenag: Kemudian sesungguhnya tempat kembali mereka benar-benar ke neraka Jahim.
t_id.sabiq: Lalu, tempat kembali mereka adalah neraka. Mereka berada dalam siksaan terus menerus: digiring ke pohon zaqqûm untuk makan dan minum kemudian dikembalikan lagi ke tempat mereka semula.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Kemudian sesungguhnya tempat kembali mereka benar-benar ke neraka Jahim) ayat ini memberikan pengertian, bahwa mereka keluar dahulu dari dalam neraka untuk meminum air hamim atau air yang sangat panas itu, dan bahwasanya air yang sangat panas itu adanya di luar neraka.
t_id.iwq: Kemudian sesungguhnya tempat kembali mereka benar-benar ke neraka Jahim.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ثم إن مرجعهم لإلى الجحيم» يفيد أنهم يخرجون منها لشرب الحميم وأنه خارجها
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Kemudian sesungguhnya tempat kembali mereka benar-benar ke neraka Jahim) ayat ini memberikan pengertian, bahwa mereka keluar dahulu dari dalam neraka untuk meminum air hamim atau air yang sangat panas itu, dan bahwasanya air yang sangat panas itu adanya di luar neraka

t.sahih-int: Indeed they found their fathers astray
t.asad: for, behold, they found their forebears on a wrong way
t.yusuf-ali: Truly they found their fathers on the wrong Path
t.pickthall: They indeed found their fathers astray
t.arberry: They found their fathers erring
t.hilali-khan: Verily, they found their fathers on the wrong path
t.itani: They had found their parents astray.
t.mubarakpuri: Verily, they found their fathers on the wrong path;
t.qarib: for they found their fathers misguided
t.wahiduddin: They found their fathers had gone astray
t.shakir: Surely they found their fathers going astray
t.haleem: They found their forefathers astray
t.maariful: They found their fathers on the wrong path
t.khattab: Indeed, they found their forefathers astray
t.ghali: Surely they came upon their fathers erring
t.irving: They discovered their forefathers had been misled
t.iwq: Indeed they found their fathers astray

t_id.kemenag: Karena sesungguhnya mereka mendapati bapak-bapak mereka dalam Keadaaan sesat.
t_id.sabiq: Sesungguhnya mereka mendapatkan nenek moyangnya dalam keadaan sesat. Kemudian dengan tergesa-gesa mengikuti jejak langkah mereka menelusuri jalan kesesatan secara membabi buta. Seakan- akan mereka menganjurkan untuk mengikuti nenek moyang mereka tanpa berpikir.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Karena sesungguhnya mereka mendapati) menemukan (bapak-bapak mereka dalam keadaan sesat.)
t_id.iwq: Karena sesungguhnya mereka mendapati bapak-bapak mereka dalam Keadaaan sesat.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إنهم ألفوْا» وجدوا «آباءهم ضالين»
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Karena sesungguhnya mereka mendapati) menemukan (bapak-bapak mereka dalam keadaan sesat)

t.sahih-int: So they hastened [to follow] in their footsteps
t.asad: and [now] they make haste to follow in their footsteps
t.yusuf-ali: So they (too) were rushed down on their footsteps
t.pickthall: But they make haste (to follow) in their footsteps
t.arberry: and they run in their footsteps
t.hilali-khan: So they (too) made haste to follow in their footsteps
t.itani: And rushed along in their footsteps.
t.mubarakpuri: So they (too) hastened in their footsteps!
t.qarib: so they rushed [to follow] in their footsteps
t.wahiduddin: so they are rushing to follow in their footsteps
t.shakir: So in their footsteps they are being hastened on
t.haleem: and rushed to follow in their footsteps- before the disbelievers [of Mecca]
t.maariful: So, they used to run in their footsteps
t.khattab: so they rushed in their footsteps
t.ghali: So they are made to hurry in their tracks
t.irving: and yet they went scurrying along in their footsteps
t.iwq: So they hastened to follow in their footsteps

t_id.kemenag: Lalu mereka sangat tergesa-gesa mengikuti jejak orang-orang tua mereka itu.
t_id.sabiq: Sesungguhnya mereka mendapatkan nenek moyangnya dalam keadaan sesat. Kemudian dengan tergesa-gesa mengikuti jejak langkah mereka menelusuri jalan kesesatan secara membabi buta. Seakan- akan mereka menganjurkan untuk mengikuti nenek moyang mereka tanpa berpikir.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Lalu mereka sangat tergesa-gesa mengikuti jejak orang-orang tua mereka itu) atau terburu-buru mengikutinya, oleh karenanya mereka tergesa-gesa mengikuti kesesatan bapak-bapak mereka, tanpa berpikir lebih jauh lagi.
t_id.iwq: Lalu mereka sangat tergesa-gesa mengikuti jejak orang-orang tua mereka itu.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فهم على آثارهم يُهرعون» يزعجون إلى اتباعهم فيسرعون إليه
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَهُمۡ عَلَىٰٓ ءَاثَٰرِهِمۡ يُهۡرَعُونَ (يُهْرَعُونَ: يُسْرِعُونَ فِي مُتَابَعَتِهِمْ عَلَى الضَّلَالِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Lalu mereka sangat tergesa-gesa mengikuti jejak orang-orang tua mereka itu) atau terburu-buru mengikutinya, oleh karenanya mereka tergesa-gesa mengikuti kesesatan bapak-bapak mereka, tanpa berpikir lebih jauh lagi

t.sahih-int: And there had already strayed before them most of the former peoples
t.asad: Thus, indeed, most of the people of old went astray before them
t.yusuf-ali: And truly before them, many of the ancients went astray
t.pickthall: And verily most of the men of old went astray before them
t.arberry: Before them erred most of the ancients
t.hilali-khan: And indeed most of the men of old went astray before them
t.itani: And most of the ancients before them went astray.
t.mubarakpuri: And indeed most of the earlier ones went astray before them;
t.qarib: Most of the earlier peoples went astray before them
t.wahiduddin: And assuredly many of the ancients went astray before them
t.shakir: And certainly most of the ancients went astray before them
t.haleem: most men in the past went astray
t.maariful: Most of the earlier ones (too) had gone astray before them
t.khattab: And surely most of the earlier generations had strayed before them
t.ghali: And indeed before them already erred away most of the earliest (people)
t.irving: Most primitive men went astray before them
t.iwq: And there had already strayed before them most of the former peoples

t_id.kemenag: Dan sesungguhnya telah sesat sebelum mereka (Quraisy) sebagian besar dari orang-orang yang dahulu,
t_id.sabiq: Sesungguhnya, sebelum orang-orang musyrik Mekah itu, sebagian besar umat terdahulu pun telah sesat pula dari jalan kebenaran dan keimanan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya telah sesat sebelum mereka sebagian besar dari orang-orang yang dahulu) umat-umat yang terdahulu.
t_id.iwq: Dan sesungguhnya telah sesat sebelum mereka (Quraisy) sebagian besar dari orang-orang yang dahulu,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ولقد ضل قبلهم أكثر الأولين» من الأمم الماضية
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya telah sesat sebelum mereka sebagian besar dari orang-orang yang dahulu) umat-umat yang terdahulu

t.sahih-int: And We had already sent among them warners
t.asad: although, verily, We had sent warners unto them
t.yusuf-ali: But We sent aforetime, among them, (messengers) to admonish them
t.pickthall: And verily We sent among them warners
t.arberry: and We sent among them warners
t.hilali-khan: And indeed We sent among them warners (Messengers)
t.itani: Even though We sent messengers to warn them.
t.mubarakpuri: And indeed We sent among them warners;
t.qarib: though We had already sent them someone to give warning
t.wahiduddin: though We had sent warners among them
t.shakir: And certainly We sent among them warners
t.haleem: even though We sent messengers to warn them
t.maariful: We did send warners among them
t.khattab: although We had certainly sent warners among them
t.ghali: And indeed We already sent among them warners
t.irving: even though We had sent warners out among them
t.iwq: And We had already sent among them warners

t_id.kemenag: dan sesungguhnya telah Kami utus pemberi-pemberi peringatan (rasul-rasul) di kalangan mereka.
t_id.sabiq: Kepada umat-umat terdahulu itu, Kami telah mengutus para rasul yang memperingatkan mereka dari azab Allah. Tetapi mereka mendustakan rasul-rasul itu.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya telah Kami utus pemberi-pemberi peringatan di kalangan mereka) yakni rasul-rasul yang memberi peringatan kepada mereka.
t_id.iwq: dan sesungguhnya telah Kami utus pemberi-pemberi peringatan (rasul-rasul) di kalangan mereka.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ولقد أرسلنا فيهم منذرين» من الرسل مخوِّفين
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya telah Kami utus pemberi-pemberi peringatan di kalangan mereka) yakni rasul-rasul yang memberi peringatan kepada mereka

t.sahih-int: Then look how was the end of those who were warned
t.asad: and behold what happened in the end to those that had been warned [to no avail]
t.yusuf-ali: Then see what was the end of those who were admonished (but heeded not)
t.pickthall: Then see the nature of the consequence for those warned
t.arberry: and behold, how was the end of them that were warned
t.hilali-khan: Then see what was the end of those who were warned (but heeded not)
t.itani: So observe the end of those who were warned.
t.mubarakpuri: Then see what was the end of those who were warned.
t.qarib: Look, then, at the final fate of those who were warned
t.wahiduddin: See how those who were warned met their end
t.shakir: Then see how was the end of those warned
t.haleem: See how those who were warned met their end
t.maariful: So look, how was the end of those warned
t.khattab: See then what was the end of those who had been warned
t.ghali: So look into how was the end of the warned people
t.irving: yet see what the outcome was for those who were warned
t.iwq: Then look how was the end of those who were warned

t_id.kemenag: Maka perhatikanlah bagaimana kesudahan orang-orang yang diberi peringatan itu.
t_id.sabiq: Maka perhatikanlah, wahai orang yang dapat memperhatikan, bagaimana nasib orang-orang yang telah diperingatkan oleh para rasul tersebut. Sesungguhnya mereka telah dibinasakan. Mereka dapat dijadikan pelajaran bagi manusia.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka perhatikanlah bagaimana kesudahan orang-orang yang diberi peringatan itu) yakni orang-orang kafir itu, kesudahan mereka mendapat azab.
t_id.iwq: Maka perhatikanlah bagaimana kesudahan orang-orang yang diberi peringatan itu.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فانظر كيف كان عاقبة المنذَرين» الكافرين: أي عاقبتهم العذاب
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka perhatikanlah bagaimana kesudahan orang-orang yang diberi peringatan itu) yakni orang-orang kafir itu, kesudahan mereka mendapat azab

t.sahih-int: But not the chosen servants of Allah
t.asad: EXCEPT for God’s true servants, [most people are apt to go astray]
t.yusuf-ali: Except the sincere (and devoted) Servants of Allah
t.pickthall: Save single-minded slaves of Allah
t.arberry: except for God's sincere servants
t.hilali-khan: Except the chosen slaves of Allah (faithful, obedient, and true believers of Islamic Monotheism)
t.itani: Except for the sincere servants of God.
t.mubarakpuri: Except the chosen servants of Allah.
t.qarib: except for the devout worshipers of God
t.wahiduddin: Not so the chosen servants of God
t.shakir: Except the servants of Allah, the purified ones
t.haleem: Not so the true servants of God
t.maariful: except Allah’s chosen servants
t.khattab: But not the chosen servants of Allah
t.ghali: Except for the most faithful bondmen of Allah
t.irving: except for God´s sincere servants
t.iwq: But not the chosen servants of Allah

t_id.kemenag: Tetapi hamba-hamba Allah yang bersihkan (dari dosa tidak akan diazab).
t_id.sabiq: Namun demikian, terdapat orang-orang Mukmin yang telah dibuat ikhlas oleh Allah dalam beribadah kepada-Nya, agar memperoleh karunia kemuliaan-Nya. Mereka memperoleh kemenangan berupa pahala dan keselamatan dari azab Allah.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Kecuali hamba-hamba Allah yang dibersihkan -dari dosa-dosa-) yakni kaum mukminin, sesungguhnya mereka selamat dari azab, karena keikhlasan mereka dalam beribadah kepada Allah. Atau karena Allah telah membersihkan mereka dari dosa-dosanya, makna ini berdasar qiraat yang membacanya Mukhlashiina.
t_id.iwq: Tetapi hamba-hamba Allah yang bersihkan (dari dosa tidak akan diazab).

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إلا عباد الله المخلصين» أي المؤمنين فإنهم نجوا من العذاب لإخلاصهم في العبادة، أو لأن الله أخلصهم لها على قراءة فتح اللام
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Kecuali hamba-hamba Allah yang dibersihkan -dari dosa-dosa-) yakni kaum mukminin, sesungguhnya mereka selamat dari azab, karena keikhlasan mereka dalam beribadah kepada Allah. Atau karena Allah telah membersihkan mereka dari dosa-dosanya, makna ini berdasar qiraat yang membacanya Mukhlashiina

t.sahih-int: And Noah had certainly called Us, and [We are] the best of responders
t.asad: And, indeed, [it was for this reason that] Noah cried unto Us - and how excellent was Our response
t.yusuf-ali: (In the days of old), Noah cried to Us, and We are the best to hear prayer
t.pickthall: And Noah verily prayed unto Us, and gracious was the Hearer of his prayer
t.arberry: Noah called to Us; and how excellent were the Answerers
t.hilali-khan: And indeed Nuh (Noah) invoked Us, and We are the Best of those who answer (the request)
t.itani: And Noah called out to Us, and We are the Best of responders.
t.mubarakpuri: And indeed Nuh invoked Us, and We are the best of those who answer.
t.qarib: Noah called Us, and how excellent was Our response
t.wahiduddin: Noah cried to Us, and how excellent was Our response
t.shakir: And Nuh did certainly call upon Us, and most excellent answerer of prayer are We
t.haleem: Noah cried to Us, and how excellent was Our response
t.maariful: And NūH did call Us (for help after he was disappointed with his people), so (We accepted his prayer, as) We are the best to respond
t.khattab: Indeed, Noah cried out to Us, and how excellent are We in responding
t.ghali: And indeed, Nuh (Noah) already called out to Us; (i.e., Allah, through the Angels) so how excellent indeed were The Answerers
t.irving: Noah called out to Us, and how favored are those [like him] who respond
t.iwq: And Noah had certainly called Us, and We are the best of responders

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya Nuh telah menyeru Kami: maka sesungguhnya sebaik-baik yang memperkenankan (adalah Kami).
t_id.sabiq: Sesungguhnya Nûh memohon kepada Kami ketika telah merasa putus asa menghadapi kaumnya. Sungguh, Kami adalah sebaik-baik yang memperkenankan, karena Kami mengabulkan doanya dan membinasakan kaumnya dengan topan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya Nuh telah menyeru Kami) melalui doanya, sebagaimana yang disitir oleh ayat lain, yaitu firman-Nya, "Sesungguhnya aku ini adalah orang yang dikalahkan, oleh sebab itu menangkanlah (aku)." (Q.S. Al-Qamar, 10). (maka sesungguhnya sebaik-baik yang memperkenankan) doanya adalah Kami. Maksudnya, Nuh berdoa kepada Allah untuk dimenangkan atas kaumnya, lalu Allah binasakan mereka melalui banjir besar hingga mereka tenggelam semuanya.
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya Nuh telah menyeru Kami: maka sesungguhnya sebaik-baik yang memperkenankan (adalah Kami).

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: (ولقد نادانا نوح) بقوله "" رب إني مغلوب فانتصر "" (فلنعم المجيبون) له نحن: أي دعانا على قومه فأهلكناهم بالغرق
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya Nuh telah menyeru Kami) melalui doanya, sebagaimana yang disitir oleh ayat lain, yaitu firman-Nya, "Sesungguhnya aku ini adalah orang yang dikalahkan, oleh sebab itu menangkanlah (aku)." (Q.S. Al-Qamar, 10). (maka sesungguhnya sebaik-baik yang memperkenankan) doanya adalah Kami. Maksudnya, Nuh berdoa kepada Allah untuk dimenangkan atas kaumnya, lalu Allah binasakan mereka melalui banjir besar hingga mereka tenggelam semuanya

t.sahih-int: And We saved him and his family from the great affliction
t.asad: for We saved him and his household from that awesome calamity
t.yusuf-ali: And We delivered him and his people from the Great Calamity
t.pickthall: And We saved him and his household from the great distress
t.arberry: And We delivered him and his people from the great distress
t.hilali-khan: And We rescued him and his family from the great distress (i.e. drowning)
t.itani: And We saved him and his family from the great calamity.
t.mubarakpuri: And We rescued him and his family from the great distress,
t.qarib: We saved him and his family from the great distress
t.wahiduddin: We saved him and his people from great distress
t.shakir: And We delivered him and his followers from the mighty distress
t.haleem: We saved him and his people from great distress
t.maariful: And We delivered him and his family from the great agony
t.khattab: We delivered him and his family from the great distress
t.ghali: And We safely delivered him and his family from the tremendous agony
t.irving: We saved him and his family from serious grief
t.iwq: And We saved him and his family from the great affliction

t_id.kemenag: Dan Kami telah menyelamatkannya dan pengikutnya dari bencana yang besar.
t_id.sabiq: Kami telah menyelamatkan Nûh dan orang-orang yang beriman bersamanya dari bencana tenggelam dan topan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan Kami telah menyelamatkannya beserta keluarganya dari bencana yang besar) yakni dari banjir yang besar itu.
t_id.iwq: Dan Kami telah menyelamatkannya dan pengikutnya dari bencana yang besar.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ونجيناه وأهله من الكرب العظيم» أي الغرق
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan Kami telah menyelamatkannya beserta keluarganya dari bencana yang besar) yakni dari banjir yang besar itu

t.sahih-int: And We made his descendants those remaining [on the earth]
t.asad: and caused his offspring to endure [on earth]
t.yusuf-ali: And made his progeny to endure (on this earth)
t.pickthall: And made his seed the survivors
t.arberry: and We made his seed the survivors
t.hilali-khan: And, his progeny, them We made the survivors (i.e. Shem, Ham and Japheth)
t.itani: And We made his descendants the survivors.
t.mubarakpuri: And, his progeny, them We made the survivors.
t.qarib: We made his descendants the survivors
t.wahiduddin: and We made his offspring the only survivors
t.shakir: And We made his offspring the survivors
t.haleem: We let his offspring remain on the earth
t.maariful: and made his progeny the sole survivors (from the Deluge)
t.khattab: and made his descendants the sole survivors
t.ghali: And We made his offspring the ones who are the (enduring) survivors
t.irving: and set his offspring up as survivors
t.iwq: And We made his descendants those remaining on the earth

t_id.kemenag: Dan Kami jadikan anak cucunya orang-orang yang melanjutkan keturunan.
t_id.sabiq: Keturunan Nûh Kami jadikan sebagai orang-orang yang tersisa di muka bumi setelah kaumnya binasa.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan Kami jadikan anak cucunya orang-orang yang melanjutkan keturunan) dengan demikian maka manusia semuanya adalah anak cucu dari Nabi Nuh a.s. Nabi Nuh mempunyai tiga orang anak, yaitu Sam adalah bapak moyang bangsa Arab, bangsa Persia dan bangsa Romawi; Ham adalah bapak moyang bangsa yang berkulit hitam; Yafits adalah bapak moyang bangsa Turki, bangsa Khazr, Ya'juj dan Ma'juj dan lain-lainnya.
t_id.iwq: Dan Kami jadikan anak cucunya orang-orang yang melanjutkan keturunan.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وجعلنا ذريته هم الباقين» فالناس كلهم من نسله وكان له ثلاثة أولاد: سام وهو أبو العرب والفرس والروم، وحام وهو أبو السودان، ويافث وهو أبو الترك والخزر ويأجوج ومأجوج وما هنالك
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan Kami jadikan anak cucunya orang-orang yang melanjutkan keturunan) dengan demikian maka manusia semuanya adalah anak cucu dari Nabi Nuh a.s. Nabi Nuh mempunyai tiga orang anak, yaitu Sam adalah bapak moyang bangsa Arab, bangsa Persia dan bangsa Romawi; Ham adalah bapak moyang bangsa yang berkulit hitam; Yafits adalah bapak moyang bangsa Turki, bangsa Khazr, Ya'juj dan Ma'juj dan lain-lainnya

t.sahih-int: And left for him [favorable mention] among later generations
t.asad: and We left him thus to be remembered among later generations
t.yusuf-ali: And We left (this blessing) for him among generations to come in later times
t.pickthall: And left for him among the later folk (the salutation)
t.arberry: and left for him among the later folk
t.hilali-khan: And left for him (a goodly remembrance) among generations to come in later times
t.itani: And We left mention of him among those who succeeded.
t.mubarakpuri: And left for him (a goodly remembrance) among the later generations
t.qarib: and left for him [favorable mention] among later generations
t.wahiduddin: We left mention of him among later generations
t.shakir: And We perpetuated to him (praise) among the later generations
t.haleem: We let him be praised by later generations
t.maariful: And We left for him (a word of praise) among the later people, (that is)
t.khattab: And We blessed him ˹with honourable mention˺ among later generations
t.ghali: And We have left for him (honor) among the later (generations)
t.irving: We left [mention] of him among later men
t.iwq: And left for him favorable mention among later generations

t_id.kemenag: Dan Kami abadikan untuk Nuh itu (pujian yang baik) di kalangan orang-orang yang datang kemudian;
t_id.sabiq: Kami meninggalkan kesan yang baik tentang Nûh untuk umat-umat yang lain sampai hari kiamat.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan Kami abadikan) Kami lestarikan (untuk Nuh itu) pujian yang baik (di kalangan orang-orang yang datang kemudian) yakni para nabi dan semua umat manusia hingga hari kiamat.
t_id.iwq: Dan Kami abadikan untuk Nuh itu (pujian yang baik) di kalangan orang-orang yang datang kemudian;

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وتركنا» أبقينا «عليه» ثناء حسنا «في الآخرين» من الأنبياء والأمم إلى يوم القيامة
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَتَرَكۡنَا عَلَيۡهِ فِي ٱلۡأٓخِرِينَ (وَتَرَكْنَا عَلَيْهِ: أَبْقَيْنَا لَهُ ذِكْرًا جَمِيلًا, فِي الْآخِرِينَ: فِيمَنْ جَاءَ بَعْدَهُ مِنَ النَّاسِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan Kami abadikan) Kami lestarikan (untuk Nuh itu) pujian yang baik (di kalangan orang-orang yang datang kemudian) yakni para nabi dan semua umat manusia hingga hari kiamat

t.sahih-int: Peace upon Noah among the worlds
t.asad: “Peace be upon Noah throughout all the worlds!”
t.yusuf-ali: Peace and salutation to Noah among the nations
t.pickthall: Peace be unto Noah among the peoples
t.arberry: Peace be upon Noah among all beings
t.hilali-khan: Salamun (peace) be upon Nuh (Noah) (from Us) among the 'Alamin (mankind, jinns and all that exists)
t.itani: Peace be upon Noah among all people.
t.mubarakpuri: "Salam (peace!) be upon Nuh among the all creatures!"
t.qarib: Peace upon Noah, among all people
t.wahiduddin: Peace be upon Noah among all the peoples
t.shakir: Peace and salutation to Nuh among the nations
t.haleem: ‘Peace be upon Noah among all the nations!’
t.maariful: Salām be on NūH among (the people of) all the worlds
t.khattab: “Peace be upon Noah among all peoples.”
t.ghali: Peace be upon Nuh (Noah) among the worlds
t.irving: Peace be upon Noah throughout the Universe
t.iwq: Peace upon Noah among the worlds

t_id.kemenag: "Kesejahteraan dilimpahkan atas Nuh di seluruh alam".
t_id.sabiq: Salam sejahtera dan rasa aman untuk Nûh di kalangan malaikat, manusia dan jin seluruhnya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Kesejahteraan) dari Kami dilimpahkan atas Nuh di seluruh alam.)
t_id.iwq: "Kesejahteraan dilimpahkan atas Nuh di seluruh alam".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «سلام» منا «على نوح في العالمين»
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Kesejahteraan) dari Kami dilimpahkan atas Nuh di seluruh alam

t.sahih-int: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good
t.asad: Verily, thus do We reward the doers of good –
t.yusuf-ali: Thus indeed do we reward those who do right
t.pickthall: Lo! thus do We reward the good
t.arberry: Even so We recompense the good-doers
t.hilali-khan: Verily, thus We reward the Muhsinun (good-doers - see V)
t.itani: We thus reward the righteous.
t.mubarakpuri: Verily, thus We reward the gooddoers.
t.qarib: This is how we reward those who do good
t.wahiduddin: That is how We recompense the righteous
t.shakir: Thus do We surely reward the doers of good
t.haleem: This is how We reward those who do good
t.maariful: Certainly, this is how We reward those who are good in their deeds
t.khattab: Indeed, this is how We reward the good-doers
t.ghali: Surely thus do We recompense the fair-doers
t.irving: Thus We reward those who act kindly
t.iwq: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya demikianlah Kami memberi balasan kepada orang-orang yang berbuat baik.
t_id.sabiq: Dengan balasan seperti itu, sungguh Kami akan membalas setiap orang yang berbuat baik, berjuang untuk menegakkan agama Kami dan tabah menanggung derita untuk itu.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya demikianlah Kami,) artinya sebagaimana Kami memberikan balasan kepada mereka (Kami memberi balasan kepada orang-orang yang berbuat baik.)
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya demikianlah Kami memberi balasan kepada orang-orang yang berbuat baik.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إنا كذلك» كما جزيناهم «نجزي المحسنين»
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya demikianlah Kami,) artinya sebagaimana Kami memberikan balasan kepada mereka (Kami memberi balasan kepada orang-orang yang berbuat baik)

t.sahih-int: Indeed, he was of Our believing servants
t.asad: for he was truly one of our believing servants
t.yusuf-ali: For he was one of our believing Servants
t.pickthall: Lo! he is one of Our believing slaves
t.arberry: he was among Our believing servants
t.hilali-khan: Verily, he [Nuh (Noah)] was one of Our believing slaves
t.itani: He was one of Our believing servants.
t.mubarakpuri: Verily, he [Nuh] was one of Our believing servants.
t.qarib: for he was among Our believing worshipers
t.wahiduddin: he was truly one of Our faithful servants
t.shakir: Surely he was of Our believing servants
t.haleem: he was truly one of Our faithful servants
t.maariful: He was one of Our believing servants
t.khattab: ˹For˺ he was truly one of Our faithful servants
t.ghali: Surely he is among Our believing bondmen
t.irving: he was one of Our believing servants
t.iwq: Indeed, he was of Our believing servants

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya dia termasuk di antara hamba-hamba Kami yang beriman.
t_id.sabiq: Sesungguhnya Nûh termasuk hamba-hamba Kami yang beriman kepada Kami, menepati janjinya kepada Kami dan menyampaikan risalah Kami.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya dia termasuk di antara hamba-hamba Kami yang beriman.)
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya dia termasuk di antara hamba-hamba Kami yang beriman.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إنه من عبادنا المؤمنين»
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Sesungguhnya dia termasuk di antara hamba-hamba Kami yang beriman

t.sahih-int: Then We drowned the disbelievers
t.asad: [and so We saved him and those who followed him] and then We caused the others to drown
t.yusuf-ali: Then the rest we overwhelmed in the Flood
t.pickthall: Then We did drown the others
t.arberry: Then afterwards We drowned the rest
t.hilali-khan: Then We drowned the other (disbelievers and polytheists, etc)
t.itani: Then We drowned the others.
t.mubarakpuri: Then We drowned the others.
t.qarib: We drowned the rest
t.wahiduddin: We drowned the rest
t.shakir: Then We drowned the others
t.haleem: We drowned the rest
t.maariful: Then, we drowned others
t.khattab: Then We drowned the others
t.ghali: Thereafter We drowned the others
t.irving: Then We let the rest drown
t.iwq: Then We drowned the disbelievers

t_id.kemenag: Kemudian Kami tenggelamkan orang-orang yang lain.
t_id.sabiq: Kemudian Kami menenggelamkan orang-orang lain dari kaumnya yang kafir.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Kemudian Kami tenggelamkan orang-orang yang lain) yakni orang-orang kafir dari kaum Nabi Nuh.
t_id.iwq: Kemudian Kami tenggelamkan orang-orang yang lain.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ثم أغرقنا الآخرين» كفار قومه
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Kemudian Kami tenggelamkan orang-orang yang lain) yakni orang-orang kafir dari kaum Nabi Nuh

t.sahih-int: And indeed, among his kind was Abraham
t.asad: AND, BEHOLD, of his persuasion was Abraham, too
t.yusuf-ali: Verily among those who followed his Way was Abraham
t.pickthall: And lo! of his persuasion verily was Abraham
t.arberry: Of his party was also Abraham
t.hilali-khan: And, verily, among those who followed his [Nuh's (Noah)] way (Islamic Monotheism) was Ibrahim (Abraham)
t.itani: Of his kind was Abraham.
t.mubarakpuri: And verily, among those who followed his way was Ibrahim.
t.qarib: Abraham was like him
t.wahiduddin: Abraham was of the same faith
t.shakir: And most surely Ibrahim followed his way
t.haleem: Abraham was of the same faith
t.maariful: And certainly one of his adherents was Ibrāhīm
t.khattab: And indeed, one of those who followed his way was Abraham
t.ghali: And surely of his sect indeed was Ibrahim (Abraham)
t.irving: To his sect belonged Abraham
t.iwq: And verily, among his kind was Abraham

t_id.kemenag: Dan sesungguhnya Ibrahim benar-benar termasuk golongannya (Nuh).
t_id.sabiq: Sesungguhnya di antara yang mengikuti jejak dan kebiasaannya dalam berdakwah kepada tawhid dan beriman kepada Allah adalah Ibrâhîm.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya di antara golongan Nuh) yang mengikutinya dalam masalah pokok agama, yaitu masalah tauhid (adalah Ibrahim) sekalipun jarak zaman di antara keduanya sangat jauh, yaitu dua ribu enam ratus empat puluh tahun; dan adalah di antara keduanya terdapat Nabi Hud dan Nabi Saleh.
t_id.iwq: Dan sesungguhnya Ibrahim benar-benar termasuk golongannya (Nuh).

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وإن من شيعته» أي ممن تابعه في أصل الدين «لإبراهيم» وإن طال الزمان بينهما وهو ألفان وستمائة وأربعون سنة وكان بينهما هود وصالح
tafsir.siraj-ar: ۞وَإِنَّ مِن شِيعَتِهِۦ لَإِبۡرَٰهِيمَ (شِيعَتِهِ: مَنْ تَابَعَهُ عَلَى دِينِهِ، وَمِنْهَاجِهِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya di antara golongan Nuh) yang mengikutinya dalam masalah pokok agama, yaitu masalah tauhid (adalah Ibrahim) sekalipun jarak zaman di antara keduanya sangat jauh, yaitu dua ribu enam ratus empat puluh tahun; dan adalah di antara keduanya terdapat Nabi Hud dan Nabi Saleh

t.sahih-int: When he came to his Lord with a sound heart
t.asad: when he turned to his Sustainer with a heart free of evil
t.yusuf-ali: Behold! he approached his Lord with a sound heart
t.pickthall: When he came unto his Lord with a whole heart
t.arberry: when he came unto his Lord with a pure heart
t.hilali-khan: When he came to his Lord with a pure heart [attached to Allah Alone and none else, worshipping none but Allah Alone true Islamic Monotheism, pure from the filth of polytheism]
t.itani: When he came to his Lord with a sound heart.
t.mubarakpuri: When he came to his Lord with a Salim heart.
t.qarib: He came to his Lord with a faultless heart
t.wahiduddin: he came to his Lord with a sound heart
t.shakir: When he came to his Lord with a free heart
t.haleem: he came to his Lord with a devoted heart
t.maariful: (Remember) when he came to his Lord with a pure heart
t.khattab: ˹Remember˺ when he came to his Lord with a pure heart
t.ghali: As he came to his Lord with a sound heart
t.irving: when he came to his Lord with a sound heart
t.iwq: When he came to his Lord with a sound heart

t_id.kemenag: (lngatlah) ketika ia datang kepada Tuhannya dengan hati yang suci:
t_id.sabiq: Yaitu ketika ia menghadap Tuhannya dengan hati yang bersih dari syirik, dan memurnikan ibadah hanya kepada-Nya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Ingatlah ketika ia datang kepada Rabbnya) maksudnya, ia mengikuti-Nya sewaktu datang kepada kaumnya (dengan hati yang suci) dari keraguan dan hal-hal lainnya.
t_id.iwq: (lngatlah) ketika ia datang kepada Tuhannya dengan hati yang suci:

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إذ جاء ربهَّ» أي تابعه وقت مجيئه «بقلب سليم» من الشك وغيره
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِذۡ جَآءَ رَبَّهُۥ بِقَلۡبٖ سَلِيمٍ (سَلِيمٍ: بَرِيءٍ مِنْ كُلِّ اعْتِقَادٍ بَاطِلٍ، وَخُلُقٍ ذَمِيمٍ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Ingatlah ketika ia datang kepada Rabbnya) maksudnya, ia mengikuti-Nya sewaktu datang kepada kaumnya (dengan hati yang suci) dari keraguan dan hal-hal lainnya

ar: إِذۡ قَالَ لِأَبِیهِ وَقَوۡمِهِۦ مَاذَا تَعۡبُدُونَ
ar_simple: إِذْ قَالَ لِأَبِيهِ وَقَوْمِهِ مَاذَا تَعْبُدُونَ
transliteration: idh qāla li-abīhi waqawmihi mādhā taʿbudūna

t.sahih-int: [And] when he said to his father and his people, "What do you worship
t.asad: and [thus] spoke to his father and his people: “What is it that you worship
t.yusuf-ali: Behold! he said to his father and to his people, "What is that which ye worship
t.pickthall: When he said unto his father and his folk: What is it that ye worship

t.hilali-khan: When he said to his father and to his people: "What is it that which you worship
